programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 402
programme.desc: I Gøteborg flytter spesialtransportøren Jonathan campinghytter, og været er ikke på hans side. I Stockholm er rotter et problem, og Max, en søppelmann, vil helst slippe å møte dem.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 403
programme.desc: I Stockholm tømmer Max søppeldunker i kjendistette nabolag. Jörgen transporterer en 25 tonn tung gryte i Skåne, og veien dit er både smal og ujevn.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 404
programme.desc: Spesialtransportøren Johan transporterer 30 meter lange trebjelker. Slamsugeren Magnus tar seg av en pumpegrop, en risikofylt jobb på grunn av de farlige gassene som produseres.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anton kjører en grusknuser oppe i Norrland, og Amanda er på et kloakkrenseanlegg med kranbilen sin for å hjelpe til med å tømme en silo.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 406
programme.desc: Max har byttet ut byluften med skjærgården, og dagens oppdrag er å tømme søppeldunker på Ingarö. To termoser med kaffe og Emanuel er klar for en hel dag i skogen.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 407
programme.desc: Ingenting kan gå galt når Jörgen kjører en 70 tonns kran fra Värnamo til Helsingborg. Mickan kjører tømmer for første gang. Olivia transporterer kalver, men kalvene rømmer!

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The participants are taught how to handle challenging interview questions and after a trip overseas the models must pose upside down as mermaids.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: One model is suddenly rushed to the emergency room and the girls must post on top of an elephant.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final four models travel to Phuket for their Go-Sees.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final three models walk the runway through an ancient city in order to become AMERICA'S NEXT TOP MODEL.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 5
programme.desc: Etter å ha tatt farvel med en av sine egne, forstår de resterende treningsleir-kandidatene at ingens posisjon på troppen er sikker. Kitty Carter blir bedt om å jobbe med de svakeste jentene og piske dem i form.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Hele troppen trenger en oppvekker og det skal de få av gjestekoreograf Kitty Carter. Hun leder gruppen gjennom en knallhard danseøvelse som gjør noen av jentene til emosjonelle vrak. Så er det tid for en leksjon i DCCs etikette.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: Noen drømmer går i oppfyllelse når de gjenværende heldige treningsleir-kandidatene står modell i den ikoniske Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-drakten under en sexy fotoseanse.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: Flere kan miste plassen på laget, og det er bare to øvelser igjen. Jentene drar på seg de berømte hvite cowboy-støvlene for første gang. Så skal Judy og Megan Fox bedømme deres endelige danserutiner.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 1
programme.desc: Seks hundre nervøse og spente Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader-aspiranter ankommer et hotell til de første uttakene. Hver deltaker får mindre enn to minutter på seg til å utføre en freestyle-danserutine foran dommerne.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: I det endelige uttaket er det bare de sterkeste som overlever. DCC-aspirantene må nå konkurrere mot veteranene om en plass på treningsleiren.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 3
programme.desc: Hvis kandidatene trodde at uttaket var tøft, får de seg en overraskelse når den brutale treningsleiren sparkes i gang. Uke 1 på Valley Ranch starter med at jentene finner ut hva dommerne hadde å si om dem.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 4
programme.desc: Det er bare den tredje uken av treningsleiren, men det er allerede tid for å gjøre kutt. Hvem vil overleve? Uken starter med tilpassing av drakten der også aspirantene får prøve på det berømte blå og hvite antrekket.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 3
programme.desc: Last year, 1 in 7 NHS workers were physically abused and today is no different as much-loved health Care assistant Kerry is physically attacked by a patient she was trying to help.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 4
programme.desc: 70-year-old Fred is blue-lighted in having suffered a serious fall at home. With a shortage of doctors in the department, he’s taken straight for an urgent x-ray after which he’s transferred to the care of Dr Tom Hawthorne.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 5
programme.desc: The flow of patients at Barnsley Casualty is relentless and today staff are put under even more pressure by patients suffering from the effects of drink or drugs but all need the care of doctors and nurses - whatever their issues.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 6
programme.desc: When a key member of staff calls in sick at the last minute, Sister Rachael’s dream of smooth shift disappears. She must manage a department overflowing with patients, struggling with staff shortages, with longer waiting times and no available beds.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 7
programme.desc: Every bed in the department is occupied but there are still 20 patients waiting for the next one to be vacated. Lead Nurse Steph is already struggling to manage the mounting number of patients when the emergency alarm sounds.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 5
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Scout Leader and Single mum of two; Debbie from South London, whose 2-bed flat is drowning in clutter and filth.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: Hoarding is on the rise and it's believed that 1 in 20 people could have a problem. With over 1.2 million problem hoarders in the UK today, one could be your neighbour?

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: Susan's hoard has made her virtually homeless. Brian has dedicated his life to hoarding and his daughter is sick of it. Jake is lucky to be alive as his home almost burned to the ground in an inferno fuelled by the clutter he'd collected.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: Arthur's flat is packed with junk. Experts Caz and Tee are up for their toughest assignment ever. Khim is getting married but first she must clear her hoard. Mandi's passion for vintage clothes is out of control.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: Esther's hoard is so bad her landlord told her to clear up or clear out. Nigel receives a visit from fellow hoarder Janice.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 5
programme.desc: Paul's hoard fills his whole house, room after room after room is buried under 6 feet of clutter.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: Ant and Matt face up to a catastrophic lorry crash on a narrow road. Transport Manager Dan is called to an off-road nightmare, and Michael's mood is tested by a muddy rescue when a 7-tonne lorry slides off a narrow country lane.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: A 44-tonne truck careers off the A1, smashing through the side barrier and getting tangled up in live electrics. In the East Midlands Crouch's Incident Manager, Steve Kelly, has a hard-core recovery on his hands.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: When a bin lorry crashes onto its side, company boss Adam is tested to the max. On the other side of Leicestershire in blizzard conditions, Lee's been landed with a 44-tonne headache, rescuing a meat lorry that's taken a nosedive into a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: Michael is faced with a dustcart leaning dangerously into a ditch. Lee has to right an £80,0000 tractor that has rolled over on a busy roundabout and recovery op Sean knows it's no good crying over spilled milk when he gets sent to an overturned milk van.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: When a horsebox breaks down on the busy M25 Michael is in for a rocky ride. Lantern op Merrie is faced with an electrifying recovery and Crouch op Buzz is dicing with danger on the A42.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Josh & Boomer
programme.desc: Josh, a Maltese, will not let anyone with a brush or pair of scissors near him without putting up a fight. Boomer, a Chesapeake Bay Retriever, barks incessantly and refuses to come out of the pool.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Harry & Brooks
programme.desc: Harry wants to charge after anything with wheels, including passing cyclists, rollerbladers or skateboarders. Brooks, an Entlebucher, is constantly chasing after light, he is never calm.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Coach & Sueki
programme.desc: Coach, an out of control Boxer, bit a neighbor, seemingly sealing his fate. Coach gets a stay of execution when Cesar Millan comes to the rescue. Sueki refuses to walk on the leash.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Slick & Pepper
programme.desc: Slick, a rare white Puli, is full of phobias. When clients come to Christopher’s photography studio, they are greeted by Pepper’s annoying barking and heel nipping.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Ava & Gus
programme.desc: Ava, a Pug/Pekingese swiftly twirls for all occasions, possibly a neurological condition Cesar cannot treat. Gus the Bouvier greets people by throwing his 100 pound body at them.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Maya & Churchill
programme.desc: Churchill the Rottweiler is a well mannered dog, except when around other animals. Meanwhile, Maya, an affable Pit Bull, insists on being intimately involved in all operations of the household.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bubba & Garrett
programme.desc: Heidi Wasserman inherited Bubba, a spoiled Maltese that demands to be taken everywhere and nips at anyone who tries to leave. Garrett, a German Shepherd, chases his tail, obsessively.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Emily
programme.desc: Emily, a Pit Bull, has become every owner’s worst nightmare – extremely aggressive towards other dogs. She’s so out of control, only Cesar Millan’s 6-week boot camp can turn her behavior around.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Hank & Paris
programme.desc: Marsha Alexander’s rescued Mastiff has ruined the furniture and intimidates anyone walking by his gate. Paris, a long hair Chihuahua, looks fashionable, but barks and snaps at strangers.

programme.title: The Hills: Dream Boy, Dream Job
programme.desc: Whitney blir tilbudt drømmejobben i NYC og håper å få møte Jay der. Lauren blir nostalgisk da foreldrene selger huset i Laguna Beach, og Stephanie ber Spencer om hjelp da hun ikke klarer å bestemme seg for hva hun skal gjøre med Cameron.

programme.title: The Hills: Mr. & Mrs. Pratt
programme.desc: Spencer og Heidi ignorerer bekymringene til sine familier og stikker av til Mexico for å gifte seg. Whitney tar en sjanse på drømmejobben i New York City, og sier farvel til Lauren og sitt liv i Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Hills: I Heidi Take Thee Spencer
programme.desc: Lauren og Heidi møter på hverandre, og husker hvorfor de pleide å være venner. Spencer og Heidi har akkurat giftet seg da Heidis mor kommer til byen. Justin sjokkerer Audrina når han tar henne til Palm Springs for en overraskelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Don't Cry On Your Birthday
programme.desc: Når Heidi kommer til overraskelsesfesten på bursdagen til Lauren, gråter de to gamle vennene for vennskapet som har gått i oppløsning. Spencer starter en voldelig nevekamp når Cameron anklager ham for å ha plukket opp en bartender.

programme.title: The Hills: Everything Happens for a Reason
programme.desc: Spencers sjarm fører Heidi hjem til Colorado, der gjenopptar hun kontakten med en gammel flamme. Lauren forteller Stephanie hva hun syns om at Heidi kom i bursdagsselskapet. Spencer snakker med Brody igjen etter en lang tids taushet.

programme.title: The Hills: I'm Done With You
programme.desc: Etter at Heidi tar Spencer på fersken på en nattklubb med bartenderen Stacie, krever hun at de skal gå i parterapi. Lauren setter ryktet sitt på spill når hun skaffer Stephanie en praktikantplass hos People's Revolution.

programme.title: The Hills: Crazy In Love
programme.desc: Audrina forsøker å komme over Justin ved å kaste sitt blikk på Brody i stedet. Heidi sleper en motvillig Spencer til parterapi. Når Stephanie går i baret hos People's Revolution, truer Lauren med å sparke henne.

programme.title: The Hills: I Always Had A Little Crush
programme.desc: Når jentene krasjer guttenes Hawaii tur, prøver Valeria å glemme Justin ved å flørte med Brordy. Heidis ekskjæreste, som er jomfru, kommer på besøk og Heidi håper at Spenser skal lære noe av eksens verdier.

programme.title: The Hills: Playmates Bring the Drama
programme.desc: Audrina fortviler når Brodys kjæreste konfronterer henne med Hawaii, og Brody gjør ingenting for å stoppe det. Heidi oppdager en tekstmelding fra Stacie til Spencer og drar til nattklubben for å konfrontere henne med det.

programme.title: The Hills: Hi Lauren, It's Spencer
programme.desc: Lauren er usikker på om hun skal gå i Heidis bryllup etter at Spencer endelig har bedt om unnskyldning. Brody nekter å risikere forholdet sitt til Jayde for å redde vennskapet med Audrina, og Stephanie konfronterer Kelly Cutrone.

programme.title: The Hills: Something Old, Something New
programme.desc: I Laurens siste episode må hun bestemme om hun er villig til å tilgi Spencer for å kunne stille opp for Heidi i hennes "prinsesse"-bryllup. Hele besetningen dukker opp og blir overrasket over en gjest ingen tenkte ville komme.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Worst Date Ever
programme.desc: To ekser slår seg sammen for å knuse Maya og gjengen hennes. En uventet overraskelse setter et av husets sterkeste par i fare.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Jay Is For Jealous
programme.desc: Huset feirer at Farrah er tilbake. Sjalusi fører til fysisk konfrontasjon da en intim sannhet blir avslørt. Noe uventet skjer ved elimineringen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Low Blows
programme.desc: En etterlengtet eks ankommer, spenning som har småputret lenge eksploderer omsider og starter en voldsom krangel. Farrah trenger seg på andres anliggender, noe som fører til enda mer kaos i huset.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Revenge is Sweet
programme.desc: Handlinger får konsekvenser når eksene får høre om de mindre pene tingene singlene sa om dem. Jays usikkerhet rundt Morgans mange ekser når kokepunktet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Here Comes Trouble
programme.desc: Et stormende forhold blir turbulent når den slemme Angela kommer tilbake for å røre i gryta og stjele noen menn. Huset tar helt av når en dyrefest går skeis.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Un-Bear-Able
programme.desc: Murrays tvilsomme fortid avsløres endelig. Husets sterkeste og rareste par konfronterer sitt første eks-hinder. Janelle får se konsekvensene av sine handlinger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1987 Honda CRX
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Brians Honda CRX. Det er den første bilen som får en splitter ny motor, ettersom den gamle dør innen Xzibit får den inn på verkstedet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: '72 Landcruiser
programme.desc: Gaby var en nylig dumpet yogainstruktør som ikke hadde noe i verden utenom yogamatten sin og sin Land Cruiser fra 1972. Ekskjæresten solgte bilen til henne for 200 dollar. Gutta begynner å jobbe med utsiden...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Escort
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Kerrys Ford Escort. Bilen var blitt sveiset og "limt sammen" av to separate biler. Gjengen mente den var trafikkfarlig...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit takes a beat-up 1984 Cadillac Eldorado and restores it to it's former glory.

programme.title: Are You The One?: 99 Problems But I Can't Find The One
programme.desc: Verten Terrence J gir oss en eksklusiv titt på denne sesongens AYTO-ensemble og forklarer hvorfor disse 22 enslige unge voksne er ræva på forhold.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Reunion The Final Matchup Part 1
programme.desc: Etter uker på leting etter kjærligheten og spill om penger møtes deltagerne fra sesong 6 igjen for å gi innsideinformasjon om de eksplosive episodene, sladre litt om dramaet bak scenen, og avsløre hva som skjedde etter at de forlot huset.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Reunion Special Pt2
programme.desc: Etter uker på leting etter kjærligheten og spill om penger møtes deltagerne fra sesong 6 igjen for å gi innsideinformasjon om de eksplosive episodene, sladre litt om dramaet bak scenen, og avsløre hva som skjedde etter at de forlot huset.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Leap of Fate
programme.desc: 22 single gjør et skjebnesvangert sprang og flytter inn i et hus på Hawaii for å prøve å finne fram til 11 perfekte par og vinne 1 000 000 dollar. Sjalusien blomstrer når flere par raskt finner hverandre.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Flirt at Your Own Risk
programme.desc: Zak provoserer fram Brias vrede når han flørter med andre kvinner, og hele huset blir trukket med i dramaet. Tevin og Kenyas flørtende stil truer deres spirende romanse.

programme.title: Are You The One?: With Frenemies Like These...
programme.desc: Zak sjekker sine muligheter mens kvinnene slåss med hverandre om hans oppmerksomhet. Kenya og Jasmine blir offisielt fiender.

programme.title: MTV Teen Mom
programme.desc: Opplev de dramatiske øyeblikkene når de unge mødrene takler hverdagslige utfordringer eller opplever uforglemmelige øyeblikk. Det er uavbrutt drama hele dagen, hver dag.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay switches up the groups in the hope of helping them out and selects another contestant to leave.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay has a new task for the remaining contestants. He asks them to prepare a complete dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay calls the participants to the Grand Central Market in Los Angeles, where he asks them to prepare a three-course meal using fresh ingredients.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: There are only five chefs left, but Ramsay is only taking a few with him on the trip to Las Vegas, and this causes envy and irritation among other competitors.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final four chefs impress at the start of dinner service, but things take a turn for the worse and no one in the kitchen is safe.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Syklon
programme.desc: Alex og C.D. følger en gruppe barn hjem etter "Barn i regjeringen" når de tas som gisler av kidnappere som begraver bussen deres i gjørme, og Walker må redde dem før en syklon når dem.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Lucky
programme.desc: To eiendomsutviklere dreper en prest for å hindre byggingen av et jobbsenter for hjemløse. Det fins bare to øyenvitner: en hjemløs mann som har forsvunnet og hunden Lucky som hjelper Walker.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Den dødeligste mannen i live
programme.desc: Verdens dødeligste leiemorder, som kan ha vært involvert i drapet på JFK, har blitt funnet i Dallas, og Walker må gjøre slutt på terroren før Israels ambassadør blir hans neste offer.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: En rangers jul
programme.desc: En julefest for foreldreløse barn på C.D.’s blir scenen for Walkers fortelling, en rangers versjon av Charles Dickens’ "En julefortelling".

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Mayday
programme.desc: Walker og Charlie Brooks, et nøkkelvitne han eskorterer, overlever mirakuløst når flyet deres sprenges over Utah. Walker må lede de overlevende, inkludert en kvinne i barsel, til sikkerhet.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Siste håp
programme.desc: Walker, Alex, C.D. og Trivette tar en gruppe barn med på Ranger-leir for en helg, uten å vite at en av guttene har stjålet penger fra doplangere og satt dem alle i fare.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Weeman, Jack Osbourne, Pink, Stephan Dorf
programme.desc: "Wee Man" Acuna and Jack Osbourne are given a hard time by MTV security, Pink thinks she is being framed by her boyfriend, Carey Hart, for running a motorcycle "chop shop" and Stephen Dorff (Blade) is set up to get stuck with an $8,000 bar tab.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Missy Elliot, Hilary Duff, Usher
programme.desc: Missy Elliott gets caught up in a bling sting when her jewel-encrusted dog tags are given to the wrong messenger, Hilary Duff gets a driver's education when her car gets jacked by the Punk'd crew. Also, Usher's brother is picked up for shoplifting...

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Nick Carter, Tommy Lee, Lil' Bow Wow
programme.desc: Nick Carter thinks he's punking his friend Tommy Lee, only to find out tables have been turned on him, Tommy Lee thinks he and his friend Nick Carter are going for a test drive only to find that they've been involved in a hit and run Punk'd Style...

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Mya, Katie Holmes, Tracy Morgan
programme.desc: Mya gets up close and personal with her biggest fan, Katie Holmes (Dawson's Creek) gets involved in a torrid love triangle and Tracy Morgan (The Tracy Morgan Show) gets his car towed when the Punk'd valet crew parks his ride in the red zone.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Dingo
programme.desc: Snowboarderen The Dingo hjelper Rob med å presentere Pain Angels, Worst Case Scenarios og That'll Cost You. Og du gjetter aldri hva som skjer når en vektløfter mister kontrollen.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matthew Mounce
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo og Chanel ler seg i hjel av Unnecessary Combos, Stay Out Of The Water og Who Put That There, og karateeksperten Matthew Mounce presenterer Bad Karate.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jeff Tremaine
programme.desc: Produsenten Jeff Tremaine hjelper Rob med å presentere episodens klipp. Noen barn begynner tidlig i Ridiculousness in Training, og to elefanter hjelper hverandre med en vanskelig matbit.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Schlager
programme.desc: Skjønnhetsdronningen Caite Upton er med i panelet, Matt Schlager viser hvordan man faller med ansiktet først, og du får se klippene Inappropriate Animals, Misfires And False Starts og Yoga Fart.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Hunted
programme.desc: While rescuing an imprisoned patriot, Barney is critically wounded and must be left behind in order for the IMF to complete their mission in the "Hunted" episode of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Amateur
programme.desc: Before the IMF can get the prototype of an Iron Curtain country's secret weapon to the United States, part of the weapon falls into the hands of an unscrupulous, greedy nightclub owner, in "The Amateur"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Catafalque
programme.desc: With the threat of another off-shore missile crisis and perhaps a confrontation that could lead to war, the IMF is called upon to expose a nuclear arms treaty secretly signed by a previously friendly country and a hostile power in "The Catafalque"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Squeeze Play
programme.desc: A leading illegal supplier of heroin is dying of cancer and is about to designate a successor and turn over to him the only known list containing all the vital information about the entire drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Merchant
programme.desc: George Sanders guest stars, one of the world's largest dealers in illegal arms, who is about to complete a deal involving guerilla groups in North Africa and the Middle East in "The Merchant"

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bergen
programme.desc: Surrounded by some of the most beautiful landscapes in northern Europe, Bergen has become a centre for the finest seafood in northern Europe. Tareq heads into this winter wonderland to see the curious cuisine that has developed in western Norway.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: The Faroe Islands
programme.desc: Tareq comes to understand what is in the soul of the Faroese, and why their cuisine has developed the way it has. We explore the beautiful capital Torshavn and surrounding villages, and sail into a cave for a recipe prepared on a rowboat.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Central Jutland
programme.desc: Volcanoes and glaciers shaped this part of the country, leaving a giant fjord and pre-historic fossils in their wake. Farmers and food innovators work closely with nature to prepare food with the area’s plentiful herbs and award-winning seafood.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland (Part 2)
programme.desc: Tareq goes back to Åland to explore more of this island territory. Tareq finds a chef setting up a huge food village, sees forts left over from various invaders over the centuries, and learns about beer being recreated from 200 year old DNA.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Tornedalen
programme.desc: There are not many places like Tornedalen. A rushing river has provided for locals for centuries, and the very fertile land has yielded amazing crops for centuries.Tareq explores the traditions and the food that are part of the short summer season.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Jutland
programme.desc: At the northern-most part of Denmark, you are always close to raw, beautiful nature, and incredible sunlight that has drawn artists here for over 100 years. Tareq visits a salt maker using medieval techniques and experiences the magic light of Skagen.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: East Denmark
programme.desc: East Denmark contains some of Denmark’s most fertile lands, and many traditional farmers are converting to organic production and winning awards for their cheeses and wine. Tareq bikes through an area of limestone cliffs and Viking ships.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kristianstad
programme.desc: Located in Sweden’s south, beautiful Kristianstad is a 400-year old town surrounded by the ocean, fertile farmland and protected wetlands to aid the environment. Tareq makes his own chocolate and learns all about the art of eel-fishing.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Look Who's Back
programme.desc: Holly ankommer med storm - fra fortiden. Nathan tar med sin indre Peter Andre til klubben og Spphie tar ut sine flørteegenskaper. Begge blir varme og svette, men av helt forskjellige årsaker. Etter at Sam blir venner med Chloe, går han for langt?

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Queen Nathan's Birthday
programme.desc: Holly er bekymret for Chloe, men Chloe vil bare gi Sam en lærepenge. Alle drar på en tur i outbacken til Nathans bursdag, men hva synes lokalbefolkningen om fire menn i drag? Sophie tar det med ro når hun tar med sin drag queen til sengs.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The New Geordie
programme.desc: Gjengen våkner i villmarken og kaster seg ut i lokale skikker som saueklipping og mat fra bushen. En kveld på den lokale strippebula fører til at Abbie får tips og Sophie går fullt inn for å få mannen sin. Tilbake i Goldie venter det en ny Geordie!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Sam Busts His Hand
programme.desc: Sophie og Alex våkner etter å ha fått avtalen i boks. Sophie er glad, men Alex tviler. Nathan ser rødt når Alex tar en avgjørelse og så er det igang. Sams hånd får ham på sykehus, så Chloe drukner sine sorger, og det skikkelig!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Pride Party
programme.desc: Gjengen feirer Pride som bare geordier kan med alle husfesters mor - og en overraskelsesgjest! Sophie ender i tårer og Chloe er ikke imponert over Alex. Sam kommer tilbake og Abbie og den nye fyren Adam nærmer seg hverandre.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gotta Have Faith
programme.desc: Geordie-gjengen er tilbake på hjemmebane og klare for å skape mer leven enn noen gang. Denne gangen får de besøk av noen gamle kjenninger, noen nye ansikter, og venner og familie mens de gjør seg klare til å male byen rød igjen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Tanned Triangle
programme.desc: Snooki føler seg fortsatt utstøtt og vurderer å reise sin vei. Første kveld på klubben blir flørtete, så kjærestene hjemme har kanskje grunn til bekymring. Et trekantdrama truer med å splitte huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Good Riddance
programme.desc: Trekanten blir mer intens når Ronnie tar Sammy i å gi nummeret sitt til en annen gutt. En deltaker velger å forlate The Shore for godt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Paulie og Mike må sjonglere flere grupper med jenter. Det blir slåsskamp i baren, og en av deltakerne blir slått ned.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Just Another Day at the Shore
programme.desc: Med støtte fra de fleste av de andre er Snooki på bedringens vei. Ronnies familie kommer på besøk, og Sammi ønsker å gjøre et godt førsteinntrykk. JWoww blir lei folkene i klubben og havner i slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Boardwalk Blowups
programme.desc: Mike ber jenter til huset, og situasjonen kommer ut av kontroll. Snooki havner i slåsskamp igjen. Ronnie havner også i bråk, og Sammi begynner å tvile på forholdet deres.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: What Happens in the AC
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Atlantic City, der moro blir til alvor idet Mike støter fra seg både Snooki og Jwoww. En av deltakerne avslører at hun har hatt spiseforstyrrelser.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Fair and Perfect Knight
programme.desc: Catherine befriends a boy from the world below who leaves the tunnels to go college.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Labyrinths
programme.desc: A young man gets lost in the tunnel world and he is found by the inhabitants. They're uncertain if they should let him go because they're not sure if he can be trusted to keep their secret.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Brothers
programme.desc: Vincent's "brother" Devin returns with Charles, a hideously deformed man seeking sanctuary.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Gentle Rain
programme.desc: Kanin, a resident of the Underworld, goes into a store on the surface and is recognized by a woman as the man who killed her son, years ago.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Outsiders"
programme.desc: When intruders penetrates their tunnel world, father decides to welcome them with gifts, but instead of gratitude, they are met with greed and violence. Things escalate to the point that tunnel dwellers have no other choice but to leave.

programme.title: JAG: In Country
programme.desc: Central Command coordinates an airstrike on a confirmed target traveling through Afghanistan. After the strike is launched, marine troops assess the damage and they are disturbed to learn that they targeted the wrong vehicle and hit civilians instead.

programme.title: JAG: Enemy Below
programme.desc: Kabir is preparing an attack against the U.S. and was last seen crossing the border from Afghanistan to Iran. He is believed to have recruited Capt. Yerastov, a Russian submarine captain. Turner, Harm and Mac help in the hunt for the terrorists.

programme.title: JAG: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Bud has lost his right lower leg due to a mine in Afghanistan; during emergency surgery he faces bad trouble. Sturgis returns to Washington, and Harm and Mac disobey an order from the admiral. Bud encounters an astounding change of course.

programme.title: JAG: Dangerous Game
programme.desc: A deputy sheriff dies while chasing a car carrying two SEALs in a Navy exercise. The driver stands trial for negligent homicide.

programme.title: JAG: In Thin Air
programme.desc: Lt. Albrecht and Lt. Cmdr. Zuzello make Zuzello’s farewell flight before he retires. All is fine until Albrecht notices that his partner is passed out from hypoxia. Albrecht makes an emergency landing on the ship.Harm is sent to the ship to investigate.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Folks From Home / The Captain's Cup / Legal Eagle
programme.desc: Doc must perform a risky operation after an accident; one of the ship's laborers is recruited to replace a missing dignitary; a bitterly divorced man has it in for his ex-wife's attorney. (TV-PG)

programme.title: The Love Boat: El Kid / The Last Hundred Bucks / Isosceles Triangle
programme.desc: A beauty can't choose between Captain Stubing and Doc; a man and his wife return to the ship with an orphaned boy; a hospital executive falls for a seemingly successful businessman. (TV-PG)

programme.title: The Love Boat: Julie Falls Hard / Double Wedding / The Dummies
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters decide to swap fiances; a separated ventriloquist team uses their dummies to rebuild their relationship; a handsome widower proposes to Julie, who has fallen in love with him and his teenage children. (TV-PG)

programme.title: The Love Boat: Second Time Around / The 'Now' Marriage / My Sister, Irene
programme.desc: Doc's ex-wife hires an actor - who takes his role a bit too seriously - as her fiance; a philandering marriage counselor's wife seeks solace from Captain Stubing; a woman pretends to be her own sister for a reunion with a long-ago sweetheart. (TV-PG)

programme.title: The Love Boat: Gopher's Opportunity / Home Sweet Home / The Switch
programme.desc: Gopher quits his job to manage a new hotel; a wealthy eccentric widow books a five-year passage and begins meddling in the crew members' lives; a magician tries to avoid his assistant by sending his brother to perform in his place. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Car
programme.desc: Richie persuades his father to let him have his own car and Fonzie comes up with just the car for him, a hot rod named "Love Bandit," which turns out to be hot in more ways than one.

programme.title: Happy Days: Not With My Sister You Don't
programme.desc: Richie's surprise over little sister Joanie's first real date turns to shock when he learns it's with Spike, a pint-sized replica of his Uncle Fonzie.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Moves Out
programme.desc: Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Go To My Head
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days: Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Flip Side
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: Happy Days: Goin' to Chicago
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: MacGyver: Split Decision
programme.desc: MacGyver helps his good friend Dent train for a boxing match and finds that he must rescue Dent's daughter from gamblers who have kidnapped her.

programme.title: MacGyver: Gunz 'N Boys
programme.desc: While working at the Challenger Club, MacGyver finds he must save the local gang kids from Minton, the local gun supplier, who is planning to kill all the gang members as well as letting Brian Jefferies take the wrap for a murder he did not commit.

programme.title: MacGyver: Off the Wall
programme.desc: MacGyver fights to save a housing project after tenants have been forced out of their homes by corrupt money-hungry landlords.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Mountain of Youth
programme.desc: MacGyver and his old friend Jack Dalton discover that inhabitants in a mountain valley live to be over 150 years old. Unfortunately, they also discover that it is the secret site of a heavy water plant used for nuclear weapon technology.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Stringer
programme.desc: When MacGyver becomes intertwined in a scheme to stop Chinese slave labor, he discovers that he has a son, Sam, who is also interested in bringing the fall of the man behind it all.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Matlock: The Madam
programme.desc: Albeit with some reluctance, Ben Matlock defends one of Atlanta’s most successful madams, Ann Rawls, when she is accused of murdering one of her working girls.

programme.title: Matlock: The Personal Trainer
programme.desc: Ben Matlock discovers the private life of a personal trainer includes sizzling secrets that might shatter the reputations of several socialites. Harry Slade puts Casanova to shame, but it costs him his life.

programme.title: Matlock: The Narc
programme.desc: Ben Matlock exposes skimming and corruption when he defends undercover narcotics officer Johnny Bauer against murder charges.

programme.title: Matlock: The Secret (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock’s client, a hot blues singer and compulsive gambler, is accused of murdering his boss/bookmaker, but Matlock discovers that a lot of people wanted the victim dead.

programme.title: Matlock: The Secret (Part 2)
programme.desc: Defending a compulsive gambler accused of killing his bookie, Matlock uncovers an unsolved I5-year-old art theft and murder, as well as a blackmail scheme that followed the crime.

programme.title: Matlock: The Brothers
programme.desc: Ben Matlock has a hunch his client, Dr. Lowell Carr, could be guilty of murdering his partner and framing a patient for the crime.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan takes in an abandoned young girl found at the scene of a murder, while Steve and Jesse go about tracking down the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The murder of a beautiful woman around a marine encampment raises suspicions. Dr. Sloan discovers more to her than meets the eye.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan suspects a cunning D.A. in the murder of an acquitted defendant.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A man wrongfully convicted of murder takes Dr. Sloan hostage. Dr. Sloan hears his story and works to prove the man's innocence. Jesse works feverishly to rescue Mark.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan shields George Karn from both Steve and Lt. Delaney while investigating his wife's murder.

programme.title: Escape to the Country

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: P-WOWW
programme.desc: Angelinas utdrikningsfest er overtatt av gutta og begynner med strippeklubben og slutter med at Pauly og Jenny ligger i samme seng.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: So That Happened!
programme.desc: Nedtellingen til Angelinas bryllup begynner. Mike avanserer og Pauly D og Jenni ville natt får samboerne til å stille mange spørsmål.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Rewriting History
programme.desc: Angelinas bryllup er like rundt hjørnet så gjengen feirer henne med en tur til Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: You Had Me At Um, Hello!
programme.desc: Den store dagen er endelig her! Jenni føler seg forhekset, Angelina velsignet og Mike litt oransje.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Speech Part 1
programme.desc: Angelina og Chris gifter seg. Vinny protesterer og jentenes tale til bruden leder til buing i Staten Island-stil.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Speech Part 2
programme.desc: Angelinas bryllupsfest blir kaotisk når Deena, Jenni og Nicole holder tale. Jentene blir forskrekket, Angelina raser og guttene prøver å gjøre det godt igjen. Men skaden er kanskje allerede gjort.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The Royal Park Hotel's grand chef Mitsuo Shimamura's last two proteges defeated the Iron Chefs. Iio is Shimamura's right-hand man and his strongest yet to enter Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: See who slips in the battle of banana, Iron Chef Kobe or Hironobu Tsujiguchi.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chen se enfrenta a Ryozo Asao, el heredero de una dinastía de restaurantes franceses, con esturión, un tipo de pescado conocido por su caviar.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chen takes on Ryozo Asao, the heir to a French restaurant dynasty, with sturgeon, a kind of fish known for its caviar.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Today's challenger is endorsed by Tenmei Kanoh, a photographer and frequent Iron Chef judge. This French-trained chef takes the route of using local ingredients in his dishes.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood rådløse på sjøen og blir helt 'Havkorka', kaster for mange erteposer i 'Villvest-Cornhole' og må jobbe med egen tålmodighet fordi de 'Avskyr å vente'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' klatrer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz i feil trær med 'Døde greiner', klatrer opp på feil person i 'Dårlige skulderholdere' og blir intense på kontoret med 'Ekstrem kontorstoling'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Paige Desorbo se noen ryggradpirrende fall i 'Ryggknekkere', hører hvordan Rob sparte penger for å flytte til California i 'Lagerleker' og avslutter med smerte ved vannet i 'Tørr landing'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' vil Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Paige DeSorbo unngå å få nesen ut av ledd i 'Neseborsjokk', unngår små, gira råtasser i 'Helvete på plasthjul' og kliner til med noen frampå eldre damer i 'Sugne bestemødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood sparkesykkel-kollisjoner til et høyere nivå med 'Sparkesykkelspark', konfronterer søppeldagen direkte med 'Vanskelig søppel' og snur uhell til hell i 'Utilsiktede seiere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut håret med 'Partyrotter', ler av noen ordentlige 'Krimklovner' og tar en titt på ulike 'Krasjkamera'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood X
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å bære alt i én omgang i 'For mye å bære', slår seg løs på do med 'Båskriminalitet' og er ekstremt galante som i 'De beste kjærestene'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis farene ved stiger i 'Stigekræsj', føler at de må følge fulle venner hjem i 'Fylleleveranser' og oppdager at ikke alle maskoter er like i 'Maskotproblemer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood verdens verste smerter i 'Halebeinbrutalitet', opplever at allergisesongen er ille i 'Naturlig snørrete' og drar langt ut på landet og fester i 'Partylåver'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis mellom snøbrettkjørere og skiløpere i 'Snøkrig', slåss mot sulten på verste måte i 'Nattmatkatastrofe' og sykler på feil trær i 'Sykkel møter bark'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Eschatologi av vår nåtid
programme.desc: Beka vinner en pris fra en radio-DJ, lærer sannheten om Seefra og finner Meethus-diagrammet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Når går rundt ...
programme.desc: En forsker fra det opprinnelige Commonwealth dukker opp, fanget i en tidssløyfe.

programme.title: Andromeda: Forsøk på avrettingsmasse
programme.desc: Flavin kommer tilbake og utløser en gjengkrig og hjelper Dylan til å utvikle seg som et paradin.

programme.title: Andromeda: Så brenn de utemmede landene
programme.desc: En krystall som kan gjenopprette Andromedas kraft blir oppdaget, men for å få den, må Dylan jobbe for gruveeieren.

programme.title: Andromeda: Det som ikke var
programme.desc: Tunneler oppdages på Seefra som kan brukes til å nå åtte andre Seefra-planeter.

programme.title: Andromeda: Testen
programme.desc: Når en gammel mann blir drept, er Beka, Rhade og Harper de viktigste mistenkte og stilles for retten

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera footage shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction. When investigators suspect the crimes are not random, they fear a serial killer may be on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: The woman had been sexually assaulted, stabbed repeatedly and left for dead. When a perfect suspect practically turned himself in, police were sure they had their man until DNA evidence proved them wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: When court clerk Peter Porco doesn't report to work in November 2004, a courts officer is ordered to the Porcos' family home in Bethlehem, NY.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim. Investigators hope manufacturing codes from beer bottles will determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: This episode documents a deadly bombing at a church in Oakwood, Illinois, in December 1997.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room with a View
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 21
programme.desc: This episode includes: Starfyre Fugitive, Mother/Son Murder, Fatima (Pts. 1& 2), Update: Lucky Lost Love and Lady Killer.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 22
programme.desc: This episode includes: Christmas Party Murder, Myrtles Plantation, California Killing, Asteroids & Meteors, Brief Encounter and Pick Axe Savior.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode includes: Gallup Abduction, Fatal Revision (Pts. 1, 2 & 3) and Wrong Grave.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode includes: Twice Burned, Elvis, The Twinless Twin, Where Is Wanda Jean?, Short Walk Home, Rapist MD and Molnar Heir.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode includes: Down & Out, Honeymoon Bones, Return From Heaven, Sal and Sally, Women in the Bay and Stahl's Paintings.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Slain Swain, Goldie's Girl, James Van Praagh (Pts. 1 & 2), Thanks Big Brother and Fugitive Counterfeiter.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cop Killer
programme.desc: In 1995, our nation's capital was also our nation's murder capital. Even the police weren't safe. While Washington, DC, law enforcement targeted criminals, the criminals targeted law enforcement, even gunning down officers on patrol.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, a serial killer stalked lone victims in the dead of night, his hunting ground the suburbs of Washington, D.C., his target, anyone who owned a car.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Under Fire
programme.desc: A series of armored car heists and bloody shoot-outs shocked law enforcement. The brutal violence of the crimes suggested a motive more complex than greed. When the robbers started targeting police, the FBI took charge.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Threat
programme.desc: A suspected drug dealer would stop at nothing to keep local and federal authorities from building a case against him. When his organization started targeting the government itself, federal agencies went on high alert.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Family Secrets
programme.desc: A woman and her infant son vanish. The husband is frantic. The clues are scarce, but hopes linger, even as the hours and days tick by without a word. Was she on the run, or the victim of foul play?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fateful Twist
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scent Of The Kill
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead Wrong
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Vanished
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tainted Blood
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his paranormal investigation at The Old Market Tavern and he appears to have attracted the attention of spirit that launches a physical attack on him. Will he survive the night?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Astley Green to the infamous Astley Green Colliery Museum. So many reports of paranormal activity have been confirmed at the mine, from lost miners to tormented souls.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation into Astley Green Colliery Museum and attempts to make further contact with the souls and spirits who have lost their lives there. Will he succeed?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Knutsford Crown Court – Part 1
programme.desc: Derek Acorah’s The Past Hunters travel to Knutsford and investigate a former Crown Court. Multiple people have been sentenced to death and life in prison, but will the team encounter any of its former inmates tonight?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Knutsford Crown Court – Part 2
programme.desc: Derek Acorah’s The Past Hunters continue their investigation of Knutsford Crown Court. As they delve deeper into the building, will the ghosts and spirits make contact through Derek?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She's a Crazy Stalker
programme.desc: Victor met Jasmine a few years ago but claimed they never had sex. Jasmine claims that they fell in love and want him back! Who's telling the truth?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Joe met “Jessica” on a phone chat line. A few months later, she revealed she was pregnant. Then, Chastity claims that her ex Trent fathered her child. What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Chelse claims that her 19-month-old daughter is Malcolm's and that he beat her while pregnant. Amber and Phillip accuse each other of being abusive and want the polygraph tests to prove their claims!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Slept Around: Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Tasha wants to prove to her ex Martin that he fathered her four-year-old. Martin's sister says that the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence. Who's the real father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Bullied Out of School
programme.desc: Aabrea and Jerae bullied a high school girl so badly that she dropped out. Can Steve help them resolve their differences and figure out why so many teens turn to bullying?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Extreme Deception Indicated
programme.desc: Joe and Tammy have been together for six years and they have two children. Joe faces cheating accusations again and returns to Steve's stage for his lie detector results!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Weapon of Choice
programme.desc: When mother of two Shaundra Murr is run over in front of her house, officers initially suspect a hit and run. Until Lt. Joe Kenda uncovers evidence proving Shaundra’s murder was a crime of passion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Slaughterhouse Six
programme.desc: Solider and young father Layne Schmidtke is brutally beaten to death by a mob of teenagers. Kenda must reconstruct the chaotic scene through forensic evidence and witness testimonies.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Last Call for Murder
programme.desc: Five people are shot in a cold-blooded robbery. With much of the evidence lost in a fire set by the suspect. An exhaustive manhunt ends in a chilling confrontation with an Eagle Scout turned killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: End of Days
programme.desc: The discovery of a family home littered with corpses tasks Kenda with unspooling the paranoid obsessions of a diseased mind, and forces him to confront his greatest fear.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Stranger
programme.desc: The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Under Fire
programme.desc: A series of armored car heists and bloody shoot-outs shocked law enforcement. The brutal violence of the crimes suggested a motive more complex than greed. When the robbers started targeting police, the FBI took charge.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories: Terry Bradshaw
programme.desc: Along with his wife Tammy, football and broadcasting legend Terry Bradshaw calls upon psychic medium Kim Russo to gain clarity on the paranormal activity occurring on their Oklahoma ranch.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories: Paula Abdul
programme.desc: Music icon Paula Abdul brings psychic medium Kim Russo back to her former California home where she was troubled by incessant spirits.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Lake Club Horror
programme.desc: The Lake Club is transformed into a rock n roll nightclub with mysterious happenings.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunting of Summerwind
programme.desc: Ginger moves her family into an old mansion. A supernatural presence torments her husband.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hell House

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Reel Thing

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Eyes of Toklamanee

programme.title: Andromeda: Mayflies dans

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 105
programme.desc: Tina Jørgensen forsvant etter en kveld på byen i Stavanger. En måned senere finner politiet liket av en 20 år gammel kvinne. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av Tina og deretter dumpet henne langs en øde veistrekning?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 301
programme.desc: Justisminister Tor Mikkel Wara blir i 2018 utsatt for en rekke alvorlige angrep på sitt private hjem. I flere måneder står politiet uten spor, helt til det kommer et sjokkerende gjennombrudd i saken.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 404
programme.desc: I desember 2015 gjør gallerist Reidar Osen et ærend med varebilen sin da han blir kapret av ukjente gjerningsmenn, som truer ham på livet og krever to millioner kroner. Hvem står bak kidnappingen?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 102
programme.desc: Åtte år gamle Monika Sviglinskaja blir funnet død i sitt hjem på Sotra. Politiet mener det dreier seg om et selvmord og henlegger saken. Men moren hennes er fortsatt overbevist om at noe kriminelt har skjedd.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Grand Mufti
programme.desc: The controversy surrounding Mohammad Amin al-Husayni, stems from his Nazi collaboration. He recruited Bosnian Muslims and advocated for a Palestinian homeland with Nazi help. His diaries reveal awareness of the Holocaust and anti-Semitic sentiments.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: The Final Solution
programme.desc: This is the story of how Hitler orchestrated the genocide of 6 million Jews. Hitler portrayed Jews as a societal threat, using Goebbels' propaganda. Deportations were masked as resettlements while Auschwitz-Birkenau became a death factory.

programme.title: Mata Hari - The Beautiful Spy
programme.desc: Mata Hari. Dance, Seduction and Espionage. The enduring myth.

programme.title: Secret War: Hardy Amies and Operation Ratweek
programme.desc: Operation Ratweek’s existence has always been denied. However WMR has now discovered evidence that it existed and was carried out.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Slovenia: The Crow's Flight
programme.desc: Monty heads to Slovenia to retrace one of the most daring, yet unknown, mass escapes of Allied prisoners during the second world war, made possible only with the help of partisans and locals.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: iQ
programme.desc: Carly vil imponere en ny fyr ved å prøve å virke smartere enn hun er. Og gjengen prøver å finne et nytt sted å bo til T-Bo, etter at han har blitt kastet ut av Groovy Smoothie.

programme.title: iCarly: Møtet med førstedamen
programme.desc: Et føderalt bureau begynner å undersøke iCarly-gjengen etter at de hacker seg inn på et sikkerhetsnettverk for å holde nettfødselsdag for Carlys far. Gjestestjerne - Michelle Obama.

programme.title: iCarly: Billetten
programme.desc: Gjengen, minus Carly, tar med Sam til Canadian Fat Cake-fabrikken, men oppdager så at Sam ikke får komme tilbake inn i USA. I mens får Carly bekymringer i badekaret når hun gjør seg klar til daten sin.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Yakima
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt disset i et intervju om iCarly, prøver Freddie å vise sin kreative side gjennom å webb-sende iCarly i 3D. Spencer ansetter en assistent som han ikke har råd til å betale.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: Christopher Cane, skuespilleren som spiller Rex on Victorious, venner tilbake som vert i et dyptgående intervju med stjernerne fra iCarly og viser deres supergøyale tabber og bortklipte scener. Gjestestjerne: Rex fra Victorious

programme.title: iCarly: Fortsatt like gal
programme.desc: Ettr å ha fått beskjed om at Nora Dershlit blir løslatt fra fengselet, ser iCarly-gjengen på hva de kan gjøre for å holde sin gamle kidnapper bak lås og slå. Imens oppdager Freddies mor den virkelige T-Bo.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly møter One Direction
programme.desc: Carly får en smittsom sykdom og kommer til å smitte et medlem i bandet One Direction. I mens skal Spencer trene en liten jente som ikke kan fordra å morsjonere.

programme.title: iCarly: Restauranten
programme.desc: Gibby åpner en hemmelig restaurant i skolens kjeller med Sams hjelp. Og Spencer designer en sikkerhetsrobot til hjemmebruk, som plutselig mister fokus helt.

programme.title: iCarly: Aprilsnarr
programme.desc: I dette spesielle aprilsnarr-avsnittet blir Carly og Spencer satt på gaten, så gjengen sitter og tenker tilbake på sin tid i Bushwell Plaza. Men minnene deres stemmer kanskje ikke alltid helt med hvordan vi husker hendelsene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dårlig stemning i butikken
programme.desc: Freddies nye drømmejobb i Pear Store blir et mareritt når Sam også blir ansatt. Imens prøver Carly å bli inviteret ut av en fra Pear Store, og Spencer må melde seg til frivillig jobb på den lokale brannstasjonen.

programme.title: Totally Turtles
programme.desc: Cowabunga! Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles kommer rett fra kloakken og er klare til å kjempe mot både fremmede og mutante fiender. Ta en pizza og gjør deg klar for maksimal Turtle Power!

programme.title: Key & Peele: Hollywood Sequel Doctor
programme.desc: Kileleking mellem to venner blir plutselig merkelig, forfattere brainstormer til 'Gremlins 2', to bøller mistenker vennen sin for å stjele og Keegan og Jordan diskuterer Afrika på en fest.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Biological Dad
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer et romvesen som lærer om kvinnelig anatomi, karer som prøver å overgå hverandre og møtet mellom de to siste mennesker på Jorden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Y'all Ready For This?
programme.desc: Et fotballag girer seg opp før en kamp, president Obama og Luther møter Hillary Clinton, to karer forbereder seg på potensielle trusler på et fly, pirater synger en sang og en betjent er litt for skyteglad.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Manly Tears
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en narkohandel som går på trynet, en mafiafyr som er en stor grinasabb, og Darius Rucker som prøver å takle sin Hootie-fortid.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Michael Jackson Halloween
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan feirer Halloween med å flykte fra rasistiske zombier, skuespillerne i 'Human Centipede' har en skremmende gjenforening, og vi besøker en folkeskole for trollmenn med problemer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Killer Concept Album
programme.desc: En politiker benekter å ha sendt rampete bilder, en detektiv forhører en rapper, Cedric og Levi finner lyn i en flaske, to herrer fra sør komplimenterer kvinner, Jordan møter en gammel venn og en betjent tar tingene helt bokstavelig.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East West Bowl #2
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en introdukjson av de nyeste East/West Bowl-spillerne, utleier-Devon ransaker Jordans leilighet, og Jordan blir støtt av en overseksuell kollega.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sex Detective
programme.desc: En respektert kriminalbetjent, ekspert i sexforbrytelser, benytter ukonvensjonelle metoder for å løse en sak, en actionhelt redder kjæresten sin og en ansatt i en butikk med yoghurt-is tester for mange vareprøver.

programme.title: Key & Peele: I'm Retired
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en ungkars-fest som blir underlig og en svart fyr med en hvit penis.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Joke Stealing
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en fotballspiller som blir straffet for å juble for mye, Jordan og Keegan som går på premieren på "Othello" og en high school-elev som blir berømt for å stjele en vits.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sex Addict Wendel
programme.desc: Artister blir sparket i skrittet på grunn av kunsten sin, klassens klovn terroriserer læreren og en mann prøver å få hellet med seg på et møte for sexmisbrukere.

programme.title: Broad City: Jews on a Plane

programme.title: Broad City: Sliding Doors

programme.title: Broad City: Twaining Day
programme.desc: Abbis korte tilbakekomst til Soulstice blir interessant når hun får opplæringsmuligheten som hun alltid har drømt om. I mellomtiden får Ilana en ny jobb på en restaurant.

programme.title: Broad City: Just the Tips
programme.desc: Ilana går amok med pengene hun tjente på servitørjobben, og Abbis nye forhold gjør at det lyser av henne. På fest senere den kvelden, møter jentene på en gammel venn.

programme.title: Broad City: Mushrooms
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana ruser seg på sopp og opplever en hendelsesrik trip.

programme.title: Broad City: Abbi's Mom
programme.desc: Abbis mor kommer til byen på besøk, og Ilana navigerer Sushi Mambeaux' intense arbeidskultur samtidig som hun håndterer sin sesongavhengig depresjon.

programme.title: Broad City: Witches
programme.desc: Abbi føler seg gammel etter å ha funnet et grått hår; Ilana går til en sexterapeut.

programme.title: Broad City: Florida

programme.title: Broad City: House Sitting
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Jaime og Lincoln passer huset til Strands. Ilana og Lincoln definerer forholdet deres, og Abbi går på en Bumble-date med en mann fra fortiden hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bed Bugs
programme.desc: En fancy ny veske gir Abbi tillit under arbeidsledigheten. Ilana og Jaimé må ta tak i et uunngåelig New York City-mareritt.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Fire Fighters Are Jerks

programme.desc: After getting it on with nearly every other man in Reno, Johnson finally hooks up with Garcia, and Dangle breaks out his chimney sweep costume.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Undercover Drug Bust

programme.desc: Garcia shoots a Dungeons & Dragons player, and Junior accidentally gets married during a sting operation.

programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.desc: With time running out, Martin Johnson has one last stab at glory: Ashley "Smashly" Evans.

programme.desc: Dave imagines a "Real World" season with an all-black cast and one super-white guy.

programme.desc: Tyrone mistakes an intervention for a crack sale, and "Frontline" covers racist animals.

programme.desc: Dave presents the History Channel coverage of great inner-city gang wars from the 1980s.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Make-A-Wish & Fisticuff
programme.desc: Dave sees people's inner thoughts and freaks out when a little kid beats him at video games.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: O'Dweeds & Trading Spouses
programme.desc: Dave shows what happens when couples try "Trading Spouses" and introduces a family-friendly brand of pot; musical guest Black Star.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Atheist In A Foxhole
programme.desc: Daniel profilerer en hedning i haltertopp, forteller om sitt eksklusive møte med en politiker fra Alaska, og skriver en sang til studentforeningsgutter som ikke er rasistisk, sjåvinistisk eller støtende.

programme.title: Tosh.0: RC Car
programme.desc: En radiostyrt bils nettoppreisning blir litt "Fast" og litt "Furious", "Tosh.0"-personalet spiser menneskemat og Daniel blir scientolog, kjendisenes offisielle religion.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Sign Spinner
programme.desc: Daniel snakker med en tamburmajor som tjener minstelønn, hyller de modige menn og kvinner som bærer falske uniformer, og skjenker litt nødvendig fuktighet til California.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Girl Dunks
programme.desc: Daniel gir en Juwanna Mann-wannebee nettoppreisning, forvandler nedlatende homofobiske skjellsord til kvalitetsprodukter og møter en meget usedvanlig baby.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Microwave Glow Stick
programme.desc: Daniel gir en gutt som ikke er mikroovnsikker nettoprettelse, prøver å etterligne talkshows med dumme quizzer i stedet for å være morsom og gjør det gøy å sørge over sin elskede.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Fedora Hero Saves Eggs
programme.desc: Daniel løfter på hatten for en ydmykt skrytende helt, snakker med seg selv som tenåring og hjelper to usedvanlige mennesker med å finne hverandre.

programme.title: Tosh.0: High School Football Fan
programme.desc: Daniel profilerer et unikt high school-fotballfan, beviser at han er bedre enn alle andre og viser at løvblåsere kan være farlige hvis de ikke brukes korrekt.

programme.title: Tosh.0: How To Give A BJ
programme.desc: Daniel får oralsex-tips fra den minst lekre fyren på YouTube, introduserer en motstandsdyktig baby og avslører Hollywoods mest bedritne hemmeligheter.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 715
programme.desc: Før Daniels sommerferie sjekker han inn hos Tosh.0-legendene, konfronterer sine mest irriterende fans og kommer med en erklæring som vil ryste filmindustrien i dets grunnvolder.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Angelo Garcia, He-Man
programme.desc: Daniel lar oss møte en tidligere barnestjerne som kler seg ut som He-Man, viser at havrekjeks forvandler folk til løgnere og selger sine mest verdifulle eiendeler.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Welven Da Great
programme.desc: Daniel setter seg i sofaen med "Deez Nuts", Welven Da Great, og gjør det trygt for barn å spise sandwicher igjen...
