programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 407
programme.desc: Ingenting kan gå galt når Jörgen kjører en 70 tonns kran fra Värnamo til Helsingborg. Mickan kjører tømmer for første gang. Olivia transporterer kalver, men kalvene rømmer!

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 408
programme.desc: Mattias kjører over 100 kviger og okser til beite. Tove laster tømmer i skogene i Småland. Jörgen kjører en transformator, men alt fungerer ikke som det skal!

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 501
programme.desc: Jörgen kjører en 50 tonns transformator i Skåne – men problemene avløser hverandre. Mattias har reist til den finske grensen for å frakte alpakkaer. Emina leverer fisk i Skåne.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 502
programme.desc: Pappa Roine og Mattias laster høyballer – men plutselig stopper hjullasteren. Linda leverer drinker rundt i Stockholm – og benytter anledningen til å besøke forloveden Magnus. Piraten legger asfalt.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 503
programme.desc: Biltransportøren Robin må være ekstra forsiktig når han skal frakte en dyr Lincoln på lasteplanet! Det samme gjelder Micke som skal kjøre et dyrt spabad til Uddevalla.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final three models walk the runway through an ancient city in order to become AMERICA'S NEXT TOP MODEL.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, Tyra Banks, Jay Manuel, and J. Alexander narrow down thousands of aspiring models to 33 semi-finalists.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Hates Her Hair
programme.desc: Tyra makes a surprise visit to the house to announce that the girls will be getting makeovers by beauty guru Frederic Fekkai.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Hates Her Hair
programme.desc: Tyra makes a surprise visit to the house to announce that the girls will be getting makeovers by beauty guru Frederic Fekkai.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girls Who Go To Texas
programme.desc: Runway expert J. Alexander prepares the models for their rockiest challenge yet.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Joined The Circus
programme.desc: The models learn to strike an extreme pose from a contortionist and are put to the test in a high fashion challenge with an extravagant prize.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 4
programme.desc: Det er bare den tredje uken av treningsleiren, men det er allerede tid for å gjøre kutt. Hvem vil overleve? Uken starter med tilpassing av drakten der også aspirantene får prøve på det berømte blå og hvite antrekket.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 5
programme.desc: DCC-"looken" - rett hår eller krøller? Blond eller rødhåret? Jentene aner ikke hva Kelli og salongdirektøren Rainer Schneck har planlagt for dem når de får sine dramatiske Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders- makeovers.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Når DCC-direktøren Kelli Finglass gir en tidligere deltaker en utrolig sjanse til å delta på treningsleiren tre uker etter starten, er det mye å ta igjen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: Hun er tilbake! Den beryktede Kitty Carter kommer til Valley Ranch for å undervise DCCene i teknikk. Deretter skal Charlotte Jones Anderson guide en gruppe cheerleadere på en privat tur rundt Cowboys Stadium.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: Kelli og Judy må ta tøffe beslutninger som er rettferdige, men vonde. Det er oppgjørets time for de gjenværende treningsleir-kandidatene, da det bare er to repetisjoner igjen før den siste elimineringen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 1
programme.desc: For første gang er det det praktfulle Cowboys-stadionet i Texas som er basen for Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-uttaket. Over 600 aspiranter med drømmer om å komme på 2010-2011 DCC-laget ankommer før soloppgang for innledningsrunden.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: De 47 nye jentene som skal delta på DCC-finaleuttaket har hatt to uker til å forberede seg, men er de klare til å danse sammen med de 27 tilbakevendende DCC-veteranene?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 3
programme.desc: DCC Training Camp begynner i kveld! Treningsleir-kandidatene ankommer Valley Ranch for første gang og får muligheten til å møte sine idoler og mentorer - DCC-veteranene.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 4
programme.desc: I den andre uken av treningsleiren vil noen av aspirantene bli sendt hjem. Noen få utvalgte veteraner skal filme et segment for Good Morning America, og de hjelper til med å virkeliggjøre en livslang drøm for en heldig dame.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 7
programme.desc: Every bed in the department is occupied but there are still 20 patients waiting for the next one to be vacated. Lead Nurse Steph is already struggling to manage the mounting number of patients when the emergency alarm sounds.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 8
programme.desc: It’s another grueling shift for team at Barnsley Hospital’s Casualty Department. Juggling a backlog of walk-in patients and a constant stream of new ambulance emergencies, they’re struggling to keep waiting times down.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 9
programme.desc: Today, the pace at Barnsley Casualty is relentless; other hospitals in the area are full and as a result, ambulances are being diverted to Barnsley. In one of them is 17-year-old Alex who has had a fit after falling from his bike..

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 10
programme.desc: Sister Rachel is running the shift and she’s under pressure with a shortage of cubicles. To make matters worse, IT systems start to fail across the hospital causing chaos for patient flow.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 11
programme.desc: It’s only the start of her shift but Sister Jane Hawksworth has lost count of the number of times the emergency red phone has rung. Resus is completely full of the most ill patients and it’s having a knock-on effect across the whole department.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 12
programme.desc: At Barnsley casualty today, there’s no available beds, no movement on the wards and no patient flow. To make matters worse, the lead nurse in charge, Kelly, is also struggling with a backlog of ambulances waiting with patients needing treatment.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 5
programme.desc: Paul's hoard fills his whole house, room after room after room is buried under 6 feet of clutter.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 9
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Sue from Oxford whose house is overflowing with possessions. Sue married the love of her life in 2015, and he moved in, bringing everything he owned with him.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 10
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Linda and husband Andy from Bedau in South Wales whose house is overrun with animals and hasn’t been cleaned in 4 years.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 11
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Joanna from Birmingham, whose 2-bedroom flat is overflowing with possessions. Joanna works two jobs, leaving her no time to look after her home.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: In the picturesque city of Bath, Paul’s cottage is bursting at the seams with a lifetime’s collection of junk. Known locally as ‘boot cottage’ - because everything Paul owns and wears comes from car boot sales - every room is a no-go zone.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: In Harlow, 63-year-old Bubbles’ high-rise flat is packed with piles of junk she can’t bear to throw away. But it doesn’t end there she also has a staggering 4 lock ups stuffed to the gills with rubbish.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: When a horsebox breaks down on the busy M25 Michael is in for a rocky ride. Lantern op Merrie is faced with an electrifying recovery and Crouch op Buzz is dicing with danger on the A42.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: Crouch recovery op Buzz is forced to abandon his wrecker as he attempts to rescue a stranded skip lorry. Merrie is faced with a 26-tonne water tanker stuck on a narrow lane and on the A4 a fully loaded truck has rolled over on a busy roundabout.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: A 44-tonne lorry in a catastrophic crash on the M25 calls for a multi-crew rescue, company patriarch Dave Crouch shows apprentice Olly the ropes and Merrie tackles a water tanker stuck on a dangerous blind bend.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: Stig comes to the rescue when a 40-tonne trailer jackknifes. Sean finds himself in a battle of wills wrestling not one, but two tractors stuck deep in the mud and Buzz has to beat the school bell to rescue a skip next to a playground.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: Disaster strikes on the M1 when a 44-tonne truck carrying all the ingredients for a full-English Breakfast catches fire. Firefighters are battling to put out the blaze, but its cargo has a dangerous habit of reigniting

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: A trailer laden with 29-tonnes of gym weights has rolled over on a busy roundabout. Lantern boss Lee and his team rush to the scene to get the trailer upright using two heavy recovery vehicles.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Hank & Paris
programme.desc: Marsha Alexander’s rescued Mastiff has ruined the furniture and intimidates anyone walking by his gate. Paris, a long hair Chihuahua, looks fashionable, but barks and snaps at strangers.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sasha & Shep
programme.desc: Lhasa Apso Sasha, bares her teeth at anyone who takes anything from her. White German Shepherd, “Shep,” goes after strangers, making it impossible for his wheelchair bound owner to control.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Jake & King
programme.desc: Jake tends to mind his owner Bob but goes crazy to protect Bob’s wife Linda. At the same time, all of 10 year old Chantel’s might is hardly enough for 150 pound King to even take notice.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Scrawny & Lola
programme.desc: Scrawny, one of nine Yorkies, is Allen’s favorite, but attacks anyone that comes near. Lola, a Dalmatian, barks at everything. Find out how Cesar reestablishes control in both homes.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: J & Alice
programme.desc: J is unpredictable and aggressive and his owner is now dealing with a lawsuit. Alice is depressed and aggressive towards the other two dogs in the house – a potentially lethal combination.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Caper & Julius
programme.desc: Caper has a lot of energy, particularly when it comes to chasing down balls non-stop. Julius is a four-year-old Pit Bull mix that is frightened of everything.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bella & Jordan
programme.desc: “Bella Angel” is a devil in disguise. She bites anyone who comes near the house or the family. Jordan, an English Bulldog, jumps up and down, licks people incessantly and is obsessed by skateboards.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sunshine & Teddy
programme.desc: Sunshine is a champion Doberman in the show ring but far too aggressive in the street. Teddy, a yellow lab, has bitten its owner twice, and has attacked more than one stranger.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Goldie & Pepsi
programme.desc: Pepsi, a German Shepherd, becomes intensely aggressive around cats. Goldie, the beautiful Brittany Spaniel of “General Hospital” star Jacklyn Zeman that has become aggressive towards female dogs.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 7
programme.desc: David Henderick deals with an affair between his sweetheart and his best friend. Follow up with Marcie McRae.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 8
programme.desc: Jay Smart says goodbye. Follow up with Stephan Redlow.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 9
programme.desc: Lacy Dawson drops a would-be fiancee because of his two-faced behavior. Follow up with Matt Grisim.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 10
programme.desc: Isis Draper loses love to a member of her own family. Follow up with Jamal Smith.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 11
programme.desc: Chase McLendon finds that his girlfriend is more than a "kissing Cousin." Follow up with Teri Skipworth.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 12
programme.desc: Candace Jefferson lets her baby's father go his own way. Follow up with Ed Becker.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 13
programme.desc: Paige Davis finds her boyfriend half-dressed and tells him to get packing. Follow up with Stephanie Dye.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 14
programme.desc: Rose Harden ends her three-year relationship. Follow up with Emmett Croham.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 15
programme.desc: Maria Dominguez confronts her unfaithful husband at a haunted house. Follow up with Tammy Taylor.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 16
programme.desc: Antainette Dotson gets physical with her fiance and his new girl. Follow up with Evan Boykin.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertsons plan a family reunion to give Mia a grand send-off before her surgery.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: John Luke offers to make a speech for Louisiana Gov. Bobby Jindal's upcoming visit to Duck Commander; Korie and Sadie help Miss Kay select an outfit for the affair.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase takes Reed frog hunting the night before his graduation; Korie, Jep, Jessica and Kay pull a prank on Missy and Jase.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie competes against Si to win a wood chipper; Jep gets overprotective when he and Jessica chaperone Lily's first date.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie and his brothers spend the day training with the West Monroe Fire Department; Phil becomes unsettled when Miss Kay begins looking at burial plots.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and the guys get creative when Willie plans to hire an outsider to design a new Duck Commander image; Bella learns facts about nature when Phil helps her with a science project.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys encounter an alligator using one of their duck blinds as a home; the children work at the church car wash, while Si and Willie clash over the best method to lure in customers.

programme.title: The Hills: Something Old, Something New
programme.desc: I Laurens siste episode må hun bestemme om hun er villig til å tilgi Spencer for å kunne stille opp for Heidi i hennes "prinsesse"-bryllup. Hele besetningen dukker opp og blir overrasket over en gjest ingen tenkte ville komme.

programme.title: The Hills: It's On Bitch
programme.desc: Kristin starter krig når hun forsøker seg på Justin foran Audrina. Spencer og Heidi leter etter hus, og Spencer kjøper et hus uten Heidis godkjennelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Mess With Me, I Mess With You
programme.desc: Etter at Audrina ikke dukket opp, bestemmer Kristin seg for ikke å kjempe mot sine følelser for Justin. Heidi melder seg som barnevakt for naboen, men Spencer vil ikke ha noe med unger å gjøre.

programme.title: The Hills: Strike One
programme.desc: Kristin får smake på hvordan det er å ha et forhold til Justin når han ikke dukker opp på Brodys overraskelsesfest. Heidi og Spencer er uenige om når de skal starte familie, og Audrina dater Justins bestevenn.

programme.title: The Hills: Old Habits Die Hard
programme.desc: Kristin tror hun har temmet Justin, men kanskje er han fortsatt ikke over Audrina. Når Holly mister kontrollen på en tilstelning, er det Heidis jobb å få søsteren til å innrømme alkoholproblemet sitt.

programme.title: The Hills: Sorry Boo, Strike Two
programme.desc: Justin gjør seg kostbar med Kristin, men biter seg i halen. Hollys drikking fører til at Heidi og Stephanie må gripe inn. Brody og Jayde krangler slik at de må revurdere forholdet sitt.

programme.title: The Hills: I'm Done With You
programme.desc: Justin går på glør etter at Kristin og Audrina endelig møtes ansikt til ansikt. Alt Heidi ønsker seg til bursdag er en baby, men Spencer har helt andre planer.

programme.title: The Hills: On To The Next
programme.desc: Kristin og Brody vurderer å date igjen, men når de støter på Jayde forstår de at tiden ikke er moden. Audrina og Justin møtes for å diskutere framtiden, men det ender ikke som hun håpet. Spencer går drastisk til verks mot Heidis babybesettelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Can't Always Get What You Want
programme.desc: Kristin støter sammen med Jayde når hun kommer for å gjenerobre Brody. Heidi legger en plan for å bli gravid med eller uten Spencers samtykke, og Audrina må takle at Justin fortsatt har følelser for Kristin.

programme.title: The Hills: Mr. Right Now
programme.desc: Kristin vil ikke ha Justin, men han gir henne ikke opp så lett. Audrina avslutter forholdet til Justin for godt. Brody får kalde føtter når Jayde vil flytte inn hos ham, og Spencer frykter at Heidi muligens kan være gravid.

programme.title: The Hills: The Boys Of Summer
programme.desc: Kristin og Justin vil gå videre med forholdet, og Spencer konfronterer Heidi med graviditetstesten. Brody har kanskje fortsatt følelser for Kristin etter at Jayde konfronterer ham med tilstanden til deres forhold på en forlovelsesfest.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Un-Bear-Able
programme.desc: Murrays tvilsomme fortid avsløres endelig. Husets sterkeste og rareste par konfronterer sitt første eks-hinder. Janelle får se konsekvensene av sine handlinger.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: How to Keep a Man 101
programme.desc: Chad og Nicoles situasjon forverrer seg når en annen eks kommer og tilfører dramaet kaos. En hjemmefest gjør en annen eks kjempesjalu.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Ghost of Relationship's Past
programme.desc: Nicole blir sjalu når Maddie sier noe skandaløst. Et gjenferd fra gamle forhold kommer for å ta havn.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Bad Bromance
programme.desc: Angelas verste mareritt blir sant da et eks skylles opp på stranden. Chad håndterer konsekvensen av Nicoles handlinger. En skvett truer med å bryte husets sterkeste bromace.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Ex-Viction Notice

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Ex, Lies, and Polygraph Tape

programme.title: Are You The One?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Fordums dager
programme.desc: Når mannen som drepte Walkers forlovede ti år tidligere blir løslatt før tiden, overveldes Walker av vonde minner idet han søker rettferd for henne.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: LaRues rettssak
programme.desc: Alex møter sin nemesis Victor LaRue igjen. Denne gangen i en rettssal der han er hennes skjebnes selvutnevnte dommer, og kun Walker kan redde henne.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Schlager
programme.desc: Skjønnhetsdronningen Caite Upton er med i panelet, Matt Schlager viser hvordan man faller med ansiktet først, og du får se klippene Inappropriate Animals, Misfires And False Starts og Yoga Fart.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Tenåringsmoren Maci vurderer å slå opp med forloveden Ryan. Farrah dater en ny gutt, selv om familien misliker det. Amber strever med utdanningen, og Catelynn føler at forholdet til datteren er blitt svekket etter adopsjonen.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynns familie liker ikke adopsjonsvalget. Amber og forloveden Gary krangler konstant. Farrah oppdager at dating ikke vanskelig for en ung mor, og Maci sliter med å balansere morsrollen og studiene når vennene begynner på college.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Konflikten mellom Amber og Gary når kokepunktet, og Catelynn leter etter et nytt sted å bo når moren hennes flytter. Nysingle Maci skifter mening, og guttegale Farrah ønsker beskyttelse.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynn takler valget om adopsjon på en utflukt med andre mødre, og Maci og Ryan besøker en rådgiver. Amber vurderer å takke ja til hjelp fra eksen, og Farrah lurer på om hun burde være mer hjemme med barnet sitt.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Strandjenta Jennelle fra North Carolina elsker å feste, men må innse at kjæresten ikke kommer tilbake og at hun er for umoden til å ta seg av et barn alene.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Merchant
programme.desc: George Sanders guest stars, one of the world's largest dealers in illegal arms, who is about to complete a deal involving guerilla groups in North Africa and the Middle East in "The Merchant"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Cat's Paw
programme.desc: Hari Rhodes guest stars as George Corley, an underworld leader whose link with a police precinct chief is the object of Barney's brother's newspaper crusade in "Cat's Paw"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Hostage
programme.desc: Paris, still in his cover from a completed mission, is kidnapped and held hostage by a group of treacherous revolutionists in "The Hostage" on Paramount Television's award-winning series "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Takeover
programme.desc: A political boss hires a professional provocateur to stage a violent protest, in a maneuver to discredit his state's governor and elevate his puppet, the mayor, to the governorship in "Takeover"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Missile
programme.desc: The IMF devises an elaborate scheme to dupe foreign agent James Reed into stealing a bogus missile guidance system in "The Missile"

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Ekspertene drar til Hørning, der presten og hennes familie trenger et nytt sted å bo. De leier et lite rekkehus og nå vil de gjerne flytte.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anna Thora og Jonas har to små barn - og en drøm om å bo sammen med besteforeldrene. Så ekspertene leter etter et hus som har plass til to familier, med plass til alle og deres behov.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kristianstad
programme.desc: Located in Sweden’s south, beautiful Kristianstad is a 400-year old town surrounded by the ocean, fertile farmland and protected wetlands to aid the environment. Tareq makes his own chocolate and learns all about the art of eel-fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Southwest Jutland
programme.desc: Tareq visits Sydvestjylland – a unique area in Denmark filled with endless contrasts. Many food innovators are using the surrounding environment to take old traditions and apply them to the 21st century.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Nynäshamn
programme.desc: Sunny Nynäshamn is a resort town close to Stockholm, but there is more here than the sea. Tareq meets a prize-winning chocolate maker using ingredients from her garden, visits a thriving local food market, and gets a lesson in how to smoke fish.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Røros
programme.desc: Born as a mining town in the 17th century, Røros is now a center for local and organic food producers. Tareq tries dairy products which Michelin-starred chefs swear by, goes skiing and sledding around Røros many hilly streets

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Vimmerby
programme.desc: Vimmerby is known as the birthplace of beloved author Astrid Lindgren. Tareq finds that the area is also well-regarded for its cuisine. From the children’s theme park to the friendly moose that roam the hills, Vimmerby has a lot to offer visitors.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Trysil
programme.desc: The mountains and snowfall in Trysil mean that the town has to be creative with food; Tareq learns how to make cheese in the traditional way, and goes skiing of course, and takes to the slopes to cook something as skiers pass by.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Värmland
programme.desc: Värmland is home to many of Sweden’s most famous authors and inventors. However, it is also a place with a rich food culture. Tareq gets his hands on a very rare bird to cook and also takes time out to float down a tranquil river on a wooden raft.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Fyn
programme.desc: Tareq visits Fyn, the fairy tale capital of the world. Famous as the birthplace of Hans Christian Andersen, Fyn is also known as the garden of Denmark. Here we explore stunning nature and world class cuisine.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gotta Have Faith
programme.desc: Geordie-gjengen er tilbake på hjemmebane og klare for å skape mer leven enn noen gang. Denne gangen får de besøk av noen gamle kjenninger, noen nye ansikter, og venner og familie mens de gjør seg klare til å male byen rød igjen.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Geordie Dinner Party
programme.desc: Chloe og Sam viser fram sitt nye hjem når de inviterer gjengen på innvielsesfest. Nathan vakler når han skjønner at han må jobbe på Scotts første jobb. Faith oppdager snart at ikke alt bare er en stor fest når hun støter sammen med Chloe.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Sophie bestemmer at jentene trenger en sammensveisings-ferie i Blackpool, mens guttas forhold aldri har vært så ille. Faith snakker ut med Chloe, men det er ikke sikkert at hun husker særlig mye neste morgen!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Sophie And Sam Fall Out
programme.desc: Gjengen kunne ikke hatt det bedre etter turen til Blackpool, men det endrer seg når de er tilbake i by'n. Faith blir uvenner med Nathan og spenninger mellom Sam og Chloe renner over og gjør at de pakker kofferten.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: It's Snowing In Newcastle
programme.desc: Abbie og Adam sliter med vennskapet og Nathan føler seg sviktet av Chloe som setter kjæresten Sam, først. Faith føler seg omsider som én av gjengen, og Scott tar med gjengen på dykking i tank.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: What Happens in the AC
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Atlantic City, der moro blir til alvor idet Mike støter fra seg både Snooki og Jwoww. En av deltakerne avslører at hun har hatt spiseforstyrrelser.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Shot
programme.desc: Sommeren går mot slutten, men dramaet er ikke over. Pauly får en stalker, og en deltaker havner i fengsel etter en slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: That's How The Shore Goes
programme.desc: Ronnie slipper ut, og Snooki får trøst etter et møte med eksen. Gjengen tar farvel med The Shore, men ikke uten en siste tur i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 1 Reunion
programme.desc: Man får svar på mange spørsmål når Snooki, The Situation, Jwoww, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi og Vinny kommer tilbake for mer krangling og innsikt i hva som faktisk foregikk i strandhuset i Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Goin' South
programme.desc: Gjengen skal til Miami! Mike, Pauly D, Snooki og JWoww kjører, mens de andre tar fly. Tidligere deltaker Angelina skaper drama. Ronnie og Sammi er blitt single, men det er fortsatt komplisert.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Hangover
programme.desc: Sammi vil vite hva Ronnie gjorde på klubben kvelden før, men ingen vil si det. Angelina avbryter Paulys spill, og den vanligvis så rolige Pauly D viser en helt ny side.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Outsiders"
programme.desc: When intruders penetrates their tunnel world, father decides to welcome them with gifts, but instead of gratitude, they are met with greed and violence. Things escalate to the point that tunnel dwellers have no other choice but to leave.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Orphans
programme.desc: After her father dies, Catherine thinks about living the rest of her life in the world below.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Arabesque
programme.desc: Vincent's childhood sweetheart returns to the tunnels, and Vincent reveals a painful memory of her to Catherine.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: When the Blue Bird Sings
programme.desc: Catherine meets a persistent artist, who follows and spies on her. But this artist isn't all what he seems to be.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Watcher
programme.desc: On Vincent and Catherine's two year anniversary, Catherine receives a phone message indicating that someone is watching them.

programme.title: JAG: In Thin Air
programme.desc: Lt. Albrecht and Lt. Cmdr. Zuzello make Zuzello’s farewell flight before he retires. All is fine until Albrecht notices that his partner is passed out from hypoxia. Albrecht makes an emergency landing on the ship.Harm is sent to the ship to investigate.

programme.title: JAG: Need to Know
programme.desc: As a favor from Congresswoman Lillian Dorning, SECNAV Sheffield asks the JAG staff to get the story of a submarine, USS Angel Shark (SSGN-559), which was lost on a CIA mission in 1968.

programme.title: JAG: Friendly Fire
programme.desc: Harm serves as a judge and Mac is the contentious prosecutor in a case fraught withpolitical implications when an American aviator is charged with killing three Britishsoldiers during a flight mission in Afghanistan.

programme.title: JAG: Shifting Sands
programme.desc: When a Gulf War MIA victim is found as the sheik’s wife in a nomadic Arab tribe, Bud prosecutes and Mac defends her against charges of desertion and, in a stunning turn of events, treason. Harm tries to get his old job back but is turned away.

programme.title: JAG: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Mac defends and Turner prosecutes in the case of a special op marine who, during an Iraqi mission, may have deserted his team for his own survival. Harm takes on a CIA training assignment in a mach six craft that soon has him in danger.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Gopher's Opportunity / Home Sweet Home / The Switch
programme.desc: Gopher quits his job to manage a new hotel; a wealthy eccentric widow books a five-year passage and begins meddling in the crew members' lives; a magician tries to avoid his assistant by sending his brother to perform in his place. (TV-PG)

programme.title: The Love Boat: Like Father, Like Son / Don't Push Me / Second Chance
programme.desc: A father takes too much of a liking to his son's new girlfriend; a bachelor is terrified at the idea of marrying his gung-ho girlfriend; the crew gives a troubled teen a chance at rehabilitation. (TV-PG)

programme.title: The Love Boat: Disco Baby / Alas, Poor Dwyer / After The War / Ticket To Ride / Itsy Bitsy - Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: Julie and former classmate Joey, a disco dancer, discover that they are still romantically attracted to each other to the consternation of his current girlfriend-partner Sherry.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Dream Boat / Best Of Friends / Aftermath
programme.desc: Hans Conried offers Captain Stubing the command of a super-luxury liner; Doc meets his former mentor, now a disgruntled amputee, and his wife; old college friends are attracted to the same man. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days: Get A Job
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman."

programme.title: Happy Days: Cruisin'
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Fonzarelli Part I
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Happy Days: Football Frolics
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days: Two Angry Men
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Happy Days: Sight for Sore Eyes
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Loves Pinky Part II
programme.desc: The Malachi brothers sabotage Pinky's car the night before the demolition derby.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Stringer
programme.desc: When MacGyver becomes intertwined in a scheme to stop Chinese slave labor, he discovers that he has a son, Sam, who is also interested in bringing the fall of the man behind it all.

programme.title: MacGyver: Pilot
programme.desc: MacGyver is a modern-day American hero with the uncanny ability to resolve a crisis in an extremely limited amount of time.

programme.title: MacGyver: Gauntlet
programme.desc: MacGyver escapes from a carefully aimed bazooka shell

programme.title: MacGyver: Golden Triangle
programme.desc: MacGyver unwittingly invades an encampment in the Burmese jungle.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Thief Of Budapest
programme.desc: MacGyver flees from the Budapest police and the KGB while attempting to free a band of gypsy pickpockets imprisoned for stealing a watch containing top-secret information.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Matlock: The Brothers
programme.desc: Ben Matlock has a hunch his client, Dr. Lowell Carr, could be guilty of murdering his partner and framing a patient for the crime.

programme.title: Matlock: The Cover Girl
programme.desc: Three high fashion cover girls are suspects in the death of a powerful agent who was stabbed to death in a famous photographer’s darkroom. Ben Matlock takes the case at the insistence of his investigator, Conrad McMasters.

programme.title: Matlock: The Biker
programme.desc: Ben Matlock inherits a major problem when he agrees to defend Cliff Lockwood, an anti-social biker with an attitude the size of downtown Detroit.

programme.title: Matlock: The Broker
programme.desc: D.A. Julie March refuses to back away from a closed case in which her prime murder suspect commits suicide and, after his death, allegedly disposes of a missing murder weapon.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fighter
programme.desc: Ben Matlock finds no shortage of shady characters when scandal and murder rocks the training camp of boxer Billy Leon just before the biggest match of his career.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan shields George Karn from both Steve and Lt. Delaney while investigating his wife's murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve heads up the investigation when a serial cop killer is on the prowl, while inadvertently dating the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: An exhausted Jesse, coming off a 48-hour stint in the hospital, witnesses a man die in the parking garage. Jesse returns with help only to find the man alive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Amanda's cousin falls to his death when his motorcycle suddenly veers off the road. Amanda leads the investigation when it's discovered her cousin was drugged immediately before the accident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a free health clinic after several homeless people turn up dead... with missing organs.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Speech Part 2
programme.desc: Angelinas bryllupsfest blir kaotisk når Deena, Jenni og Nicole holder tale. Jentene blir forskrekket, Angelina raser og guttene prøver å gjøre det godt igjen. Men skaden er kanskje allerede gjort.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Mediation
programme.desc: To dager etter Angelinas bryllup, er jentene helt på tuppa over talen som ble hørt verden rundt. Og Mike "The Situation" blir megler i håp om å føre familien sammen igjen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Taken Pauly
programme.desc: Midt oppi en global pandemi, fortsetter jentene med sosial distansering, men ikke på grunn av covid-19. Pauly er full av overraskelser når samboerne får vite at han ikke sitter i karantene alene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Double Book
programme.desc: Desperate tider krever desperate tiltak og gutta er klare for en familieferie. R, S, V og P har en sniken overraskelse for å få jentene sammen igjen, men Deena har en egen overraskelse som kan komplisere alt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Single Ronnie
programme.desc: Nedtellingen til Angelina kommer er i gang, og gutta må finne ut hvordan de skal presentere nyheten for Deena. Samtidig prøver gjengen å spille Kirsten giftekniv ved å lage et datingprogram til singel-Ronnie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Trouble Shot At Love
programme.desc: Datingprogram-ekspertene DJ Pauly D og Vinny Guadagnino er programledere. Seks jenter konkurrerer om den ultimate ungkarens kjærlighet, Ronnie Magro, i det splitter nye datingprogrammet "A trouble shot at love."

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Today's challenger is endorsed by Tenmei Kanoh, a photographer and frequent Iron Chef judge. This French-trained chef takes the route of using local ingredients in his dishes.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Newcomer Seiya Masahara takes on Iron Chef Morimoto over anglerfish, a deep-sea delicacy .

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Specializing in Chinese imperial cuisine, Tsui Yu Fun challenges Iron Chef Chen's Szechuan-style cooking in the battle of Chinese cabbage.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: While Japanese cuisine tends to be tradition-bound, this challenger refuses to be bound by old rules. He respects the basics, but is always looking for new ways to expand.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Kobe is challenged by Franco Canzoniere. Who's cuisine will reign supreme?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Morimoto takes on the tough Yusuke Yamashita, the newest offering from Ohta's conservative Japanese cooking consortium.

programme.desc: Hvis du elsker kjærlighet i alle dens former, er denne kanalen for deg! Kos deg med alle MTV-programmene der kjærlighet aldri er for mye!

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis mellom snøbrettkjørere og skiløpere i 'Snøkrig', slåss mot sulten på verste måte i 'Nattmatkatastrofe' og sykler på feil trær i 'Sykkel møter bark'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kaster Rob, Steelo og Lexi Rivera seg inn i spillet med noen 'Nattatleter', tar en slumsete drink laget av noen 'Sleivete miksologer' og feirer irriterende forhold i 'Elsker å hate dem'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' benytter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lexi Rivera de bevegelige trappene i 'Opptrappet smerte', møter morderiske barn som muligens er 'Foreldrekverkere' og kan ikke krysse gaten uten å oppleve 'Overgangskræsj'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' fyrer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av noen 'Skliskudd', starter hårete branner 'I fyr og flamme' og krangler om rot i 'Snuskete kjærlighet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood tak i en partner og nyter 'Parskøyting', gjør seg klar til en underholdende kveld i 'Brettspillmiserer' og opplever hvor tøft det er å dele rom med 'Pottesure papegøyer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvilken terrengbåt de helst velger i 'Landjakk', ser på alle måtene barn kan sette seg fast i 'Smårollingfeller' og avslutter med distre folk som er 'Uten romforståelse'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood i gang kjøretøyene sine i 'Flyktende motorer', vender det andre kinnet til i 'Overraskelseskyss' og hogger i vei med litt 'Økseanarki'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood L
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og deres spesielle gjest Lolo Wood, redd for å få sprøyter i 'Stikkpanikk', får igjen verbalt i 'Ta igjen-attakk' og føler hele dekkmønsteret når de blir 'Overkjørt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at uhell elsker selskap i 'Du blir med meg', strever med vekter i 'Verstinger med vekstang' og møter noen fryktelig glade papper i 'Overentusiastiske fedre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' smasher Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood handlevogner med 'Vognkrasjere', deler luftyogaens felles smerte med 'Dinglende duoer' og blir banket opp av gårdsdyr i 'Buskapssmell'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Testen
programme.desc: Når en gammel mann blir drept, er Beka, Rhade og Harper de viktigste mistenkte og stilles for retten

programme.title: Andromeda: Gjennom et glass mørkt
programme.desc: Rhade leder opprørerne i en kamp mot en krigsherre på Seefra-5.

programme.title: Andromeda: Stolthet før fallet
programme.desc: Dylan oppdager at kjæresten til Beka var Drago Musevini, og han brukte Bekas DNA til å skape Nietzscheans.

programme.title: Andromeda: Måneskinn blir deg
programme.desc: Beka og Rhade finner en test som enten gir dem stor rikdom eller driver dem til galskap.

programme.title: Andromeda: Fortiden er Prolix
programme.desc: Harper oppdager et program som kan ødelegge åtte av Seefra-planetene og drepe millioner.

programme.title: Andromeda: Motstandene av tiltrekning
programme.desc: Mens Harper jobber på en måte å redde Seefra-systemet, smyger en spion ombord Andromeda og angriper Beka.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room with a View
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve 2005, a man's body is found burning near Baltimore. He's eventually identified as 26-year-old Wesley Person. Distinctive building materials from the 1930s play a crucial role in solving this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why a young scientist has fallen gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All that Glitters is Gold
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered. The similarities of the crime scenes led police to conclude they were dealing with a serial killer who harbored an intense hatred of women.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbour
programme.desc: When a college student vanished without a trace, her fellow students were concerned about her safety and their own.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: The victim was well liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: In 1985, Julie Estes was kidnapped from the Southside convenience store where she worked. Her body was found the next day, but the killing went unsolved until 2003.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Slain Swain, Goldie's Girl, James Van Praagh (Pts. 1 & 2), Thanks Big Brother and Fugitive Counterfeiter.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Nashville Hit, Padre Pio (Pts. 1 & 2), Update: Who Saved My Life?, Mystery Clerk and Sharon's Search.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Chad, Family Man Fugitive, Agatha Christie (Pts. 1 & 2) and Fritz and the Soldiers.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: Bomb Throwing Fugitive, Paisley Hat, Mrs. Millionaire, Kyra's Crisis and Shack Fire.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Vice Cop, Searching for Morgan, Sign from Heaven, Pizza Bandits, Lucie's Last Fare and Loving's Lost Love.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Family Secrets
programme.desc: A woman and her infant son vanish. The husband is frantic. The clues are scarce, but hopes linger, even as the hours and days tick by without a word. Was she on the run, or the victim of foul play?

programme.title: The FBI Files: The True Story of Mississippi Burning
programme.desc: Philadelphia, Mississippi, 1964. A sleepy southern town steeped in tradition finds itself targeted for invasion.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Global Pursuit
programme.desc: In Langley, Virginia, a terrorist fired into rush hour traffic. The victims seemed randomly selected, but the motive appeared to be political, targeting employees of the Central Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Takeover
programme.desc: Two armed bank robbers hit a Seattle bank taking over 150,000 dollars. Before they can escape police confront them and the pair splits up. As authorities search block by block they learn one was a career criminal with a long history of violence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tainted Blood
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Dealings
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial Of The Century
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In the Camera's Eye
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Signed In Blood
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Knutsford Crown Court – Part 2
programme.desc: Derek Acorah’s The Past Hunters continue their investigation of Knutsford Crown Court. As they delve deeper into the building, will the ghosts and spirits make contact through Derek?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Leeds and investigates Abbey House Museum among a maze of Victorian streets and shops. Who will he bump into tonight and what secrets does this location hold?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at Abbey House Museum and ventures outside into the monastery ruins. Will he find the ghostly monk tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Legh Arms Historic Hauntings Part 1
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension's Bex and Sean travel to Knutsford, Cheshire and visit the Legh Arms.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Legh Arms Historic Hauntings Part 2
programme.desc: A 16th Century pub that has a haunted history. The duo come into direct contact with spirits haunting the location. Even during the day there is no shortage of ghostly activity, on this lock down special paranormal Ghost Dimension investigation.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Loud Ghosts of The Hall
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension continue their investigation into Champness Hall and come face to face with paranormal activity that is caught on camera and seek out the paranormal entities haunting the location.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Extreme Deception Indicated
programme.desc: Joe and Tammy have been together for six years and they have two children. Joe faces cheating accusations again and returns to Steve's stage for his lie detector results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Think He's Gay
programme.desc: Monique’s friend claims that Adrian advertised himself on a “Gay for Pay” website. Then, pregnant Tyeasha suspects David of cheating on her with men. What will the polygraph say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody
programme.desc: On today's Steve Wilkos, will the lie detector results reveal if Tamisha and Simone's men were faithful? Or will it reveal some more sinister results?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The Devastating Truth
programme.desc: Desiaree refuses to believe her sister or mother's accusations against her father. Are their lies are keeping him in prison? Find out today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Lagraciala tragically lost her ten month old son and cremated him, but after a serious fight with her fiancée AJ, she couldn't find the ashes. AJ admits to threatening to steal the ashes, but denies he took them!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
programme.desc: Scott and Dawn want their sister Betty to leave her boyfriend Michael because he's allegedly violent. The drama will explode when Scott confronts Michael on our stage today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Statement
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Vanessa reveals a secret she's been hiding from her boyfriend and Joel takes a DNA test to determine if he fathered Melissa's son!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: End of Days
programme.desc: The discovery of a family home littered with corpses tasks Kenda with unspooling the paranoid obsessions of a diseased mind, and forces him to confront his greatest fear.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. Violence
programme.desc: 29yr old Chris is shot in cold blood outside a neighborhood bar. Faced with a trio of suspects, Kenda trusts his gut and makes a controversial decision.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: Kenda encounters one of the most horrendous crime scenes of his career, but his hunt for a homicidal maniac leads him to the most unexpected of killers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. LA
programme.desc: A young man tries to flee a violent scene, but is shot dead behind the wheel of his car. A peculiar clue puts Kenda hot on the heels of a self-styled gangster with revenge on his mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Collision Course
programme.desc: Two best friends are gunned down on a dark residential street. When a string of disappointments threaten to derail the case, Kenda enlists the help of an old acquaintance.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Target
programme.desc: Over a thousand hunting accidents are reported in the United States each year. Fewer than ten percent of them are fatal. But when one hunter's death seemed suspicious, the FBI was called in to investigate.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rolf Harris
programme.desc: Rolf Harris became famous for his artwork and music, even painting a portrait of the Queen for the jubilee. But it all came crumbling down in August 2013 when he was accused of 12 assaults on girls as young as eight years old between 1968 and 1986.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: April Jones
programme.desc: The hunt for five year old April Jones was the largest missing persons search in UK police history when she vanished in October 2012. But on October 6th a local man, Mark Bridger, was charged with her disappearance.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Dale Cregan
programme.desc: It's 2012 and drug dealer Dale Cregan murders police officers Nicola Hughes and Fiona Bone. Dermot Murnaghan investigates.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hell House
programme.desc: Bonnie and her family buy a farmhouse and they sense that they are being watched.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Witch Hunt & UD, Update: Friends to the End, Missing Time Pts. 1 & 2 and Stroke Amnesia & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Coma Comeback, Update: Two Strikes, Palm Beach Embezzler, Twice Burned and Fumbles & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Thank You Philip & UD, Ready Teller Robbery & UD, Geri and Who Am I?

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .: Elisabeth Röhm
programme.desc: Elisabeth Röhm (Law and Order / Angel) revisits her former residence in Southampton, NY where she encountered a reclusive spirit.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .: Michael Rapaport
programme.desc: Michael Rapaport (Boston Public, Prison Break) and a long time friend revisit Erasmus High School where dead students once haunted them.

programme.title: Andromeda: I himmelen er nå tre
programme.desc: Motoren til skapelsen er i stand til å omskrive universet i henhold til eierens ønsker. Dylan, Beka og Trance må skaffe det før noen med mørke planer får det.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ting vi ikke kan endre
programme.desc: Et svart hull slår Dylan ut og sender ham inn i en alternativ virkelighet med kone og barn.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Fair Unknown
programme.desc: Mannskapet redder en av de tapt grunnleggerne av Commonwealth, men oppdager at hun kan være mer trøbbel enn hun er verdt.

programme.title: Mutant X: Under the Cloak of War
programme.desc: Shalimar blir sendt undercover i en dødelig høyteknologisk attentatring, for å finne hvorfor de vil ha Adam død.

programme.title: Mutant X: Once Around
programme.desc: Teamet går inn for å beskytte det viktigste påtalevitnet hvis liv har blitt truet før rettssaken.

programme.title: Mutant X: Final Judgement
programme.desc: En mystisk domstol finner Adam skyldig i å ha prøvd å dominere verden med sine supermutanter og dømmer ham til døden, og har sendt resten av teamet på oppdrag for å redde ham.

programme.title: CBS Saturday Morning
programme.desc: Each Saturday morning, Adriana Diaz and Kelly O'Grady report on the week's top stories; the broadcast, known for its signature segments The Dish and Saturday Sessions, offers insightful conversations with artists, authors, chefs and musicians.

programme.title: CBS Saturday Morning
programme.desc: Each Saturday morning, Adriana Diaz and Kelly O'Grady report on the week's top stories; the broadcast, known for its signature segments The Dish and Saturday Sessions, offers insightful conversations with artists, authors, chefs and musicians.

programme.title: CBS Saturday Morning
programme.desc: Each Saturday morning, Adriana Diaz and Kelly O'Grady report on the week's top stories; the broadcast, known for its signature segments The Dish and Saturday Sessions, offers insightful conversations with artists, authors, chefs and musicians.

programme.title: On the Case: The Ultimate Sin
programme.desc: A man's crisis of conscience unravels a decades old mystery behind a young girl's murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A new father comes home to find his infant son and wife missing. Four months later their bodies are found in a remote wooded area. When police investigate the father's past they find the reason for the unthinkable crime.

programme.title: On the Case: Silenced
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman goes missing, police are baffled.

programme.title: On the Case: Where Evil Lies
programme.desc: A 25-year-old aspiring model vanishes, and the only clue police have is her empty car found near a cemetery.

programme.title: On the Case: Heartbreak in the Heartland
programme.desc: A quiet Midwestern community is rocked by a gruesome triple homicide. The unspeakable tragedy robs one man of his mother, grandmother and 5 year old son.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Water Wings
programme.desc: In South Korea, Cory and Justin meet the ship delivering Buffalo's water bomber plane to new buyers there. But the boys are frustrated by the buyers' poor planning.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Meltdown
programme.desc: As spring arrives and Ray's retirement day approaches, Sean surprises everyone by leaving Buffalo for a job with the competition. So Buffalo brings in Electra pilot Brian Harrison to finish the contract.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: North Atlantic Convoy
programme.desc: Greenland's Narsarsuaq airport - known as one the world's most dangerous approaches - looms on the horizon as Cory and Justin begin a trans-global journey to deliver two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Sunk
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey hire a helicopter for a salvage mission to retrieve the rare tailpiece from a Lockheed 10-A that crashed in the Yellowknife woods forty years ago.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Turkey or Bust
programme.desc: Justin and Cory are stranded in Croatia while trying to complete the delivery of two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cold Start
programme.desc: Mikey links up with Chris Hadfield aboard the International Space Station. Problems mount while trying to get a frozen DC-4 airborne. A landing gear collapse on the runway sends the entire crew scrambling.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by “The Boys in the Band” star Andrew Rannells. Plus, Drew’s ex-sister-in-law actress Jill Kargman helps celebrate the first day of October. Then, Drew taste tests some weird food combos with 18-year-old chef and TikTok star Eitan Bernath.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: "Ted Lasso" actor Jason Sudeikis joins Drew. Plus, comedians Sherri Shepherd and Kym Whitley on their podcast "Two Funny Mamas". Then, Drew sends viewers into the weekend with a curated list of her favorite picks in "The Weekender."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Gloria Estefan, Emily Estefan, Lili Estefan, Luvvie Ajayi Jones in #ShareTheMicwithLuvvie.
programme.desc: Drew interviews Gloria Estefan, her daughter Emily and niece Lili Estefan. Drew also joins Luvvie Ajayi Jones to shine the spotlight on one of the special women in #ShareTheMicwithLuvvie.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Sharon Stone, Chef Carla Hall, Beauty Routines with Allure Magazine’s Editor In Chief
programme.desc: "Ratched" star Sharon Stone joins Drew. Plus, "Halloween Baking Championship" Host and Judge Carla Hall shares one of her favorite foods with Drew. Drew discusses her morning and evening routine with Allure Magazine’s Editor in Chief Michelle Lee.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Henry Winkler on his latest children’s book, "Lights, Camera, Danger!" "Superstore" star Nico Santos joins Drew. Drew shines a spotlight on 18-year-old hero Justin Galvin." Plus, Drew celebrates Hispanic Heritage Month cooking with Aaron Sanchez.

programme.title: Cops: Penalty Box
programme.desc: A man sneaking away from a bar fight clams he was chased by a truck. Deputies are called when a woman assaults people at a skating rink. A drunk man abandons his truck on train tracks.

programme.title: Cops: Pup and Rescue
programme.desc: A driver denies ownership of what police find in his car. Police conduct a narcotics sting that nets several arrests. A deputy removes a pooch from the scene of an accident.

programme.title: Cops: Undercover Blues
programme.desc: Police work a sting that targets drug dealers. An undercover sting uncovers narcotics trafficking. Police respond to a burglary in progress and discover a flop house.

programme.title: Cops: Multiple Identities
programme.desc: Officers recover a baggie of drugs from a crying suspect. A drunk woman hides a second ID in her back pocket. Police stop a vehicle that hit a patrol car.

programme.title: Cops: Donut Pursuit
programme.desc: Officers pursue a truck after a donut shop robbery. Deputies are dispatched when a wife attacks her husband with an unknown object. Deputies respond to a mother and son knife fight.

programme.title: Cops: Kick the Car
programme.desc: Officers intervene when an estranged husband kicks his ex-wife's boyfriend's car. A man claims someone gave him the car he is driving. A woman claims the pills in her purse are not hers.

programme.title: Cops: Maybe it's Sugar
programme.desc: Police conduct a sting operation. A woman is covered in white powder during a traffic stop. Officers spot a young boy on a bike who wandered away from home.

programme.title: Cops: Not a Momma's Boy
programme.desc: Officers are called to fight between a mother and her son. Officers respond to a man on a trolley hurling racial slurs at a passenger. A traffic stop uncovers narcotics in a young man's trunk.

programme.title: Cops: All Aboard!
programme.desc: Officers pursue a truck driving backwards on a freeway. A suspect jumps a train to evade police. A woman claims to be disabled when a pill falls from her pocket.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Émilie Godest Case
programme.desc: On November 9th 2007, around 11:30PM, aid arrives on the scene of an accident at the exit of Chateney-en-France.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Ordeal of Schoolgirl (Perrais case)
programme.desc: Laetitia Perrais, 18, a trainee hotel waitress, vanishes after evening service.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deadly Trap in the Forest - Christophe Belle
programme.desc: On March 19th 1998, Akira Ojima, a 57 years old japanese architect, is found dead in the fridge of a villa in Nanterre.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Priscillia Ciatti Case
programme.desc: The corpse of Priscillia Ciatti, 14, is discovered by the side of a field, a few hundred metres from her family home. The teenager has been stabbed sixty times with a knife and –an extra sordid detail – a devil mask is found next to her body.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En politietterforskning settes i gang etter at Maud Johansson meldes savnet den 18. oktober 2005. Etter flere år med iherdig leting ser det ut til at etterforskningen stopper opp, men politiet gir ikke opp.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 704
programme.desc: En sommernatt i Värmland bryter det ut slagsmål, hvoretter 21 år gamle Harout mottar et dødelig knivstikk. Politiet får mistanker om at et sjalusidrama kan være nøkkelen til å finne den skyldige.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 504
programme.desc: En sommernatt i 2001 er Gunn Merete Lode på vei hjem etter et venninnetreff i Bryne. I nabolaget sitt blir hun overfalt av en ukjent mann. Situasjonen bli observert av 17 år gamle Øyvind.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 702
programme.desc: Ekteparet Suzanne og Lars lever et stille og rolig liv på landet utenfor Stockholm. Men når Suzanne avlyser en viktig tenniskamp på kort varsel, blir hennes tennispartner mistenksom og varsler politiet.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Da 32 år gamle Memo plutselig forsvinner, tar vennene hans saken i egne hender og begynner å lete desperat etter ham. Bekymringen forvandles til frykt når letingen fører til urovekkende oppdagelser.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Number Twelve Looks Just Like You
programme.desc: In a future where everyone must undergo an operation at the age of 19 to make them identical to everyone else, one woman desperately tries to hang onto her own identity.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Black Leather Jackets
programme.desc: Three tough-looking men on motorcycles disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in. Yet the neighbors could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Human Face
programme.desc: A grieving couple's (Chris Meloni and Jenna Elfman) move is interrupted by an otherworldly encounter, leading them to second guess what's worth leaving behind. Tavi Gevinson also guest stars.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Small Town
programme.desc: A quiet church handyman (Damon Wayans Jr.) uncovers a magical scale model imbuing him with the power to help his struggling small town. But with the sleazy Mayor Conway (David Krumholtz) taking all the credit, will Jason's good intentions be corrupted?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Night Call
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls haunt a disabled woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: From Agnes - With Love
programme.desc: A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a computer named Agnes who wreaks havoc on his love life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Spur of the Moment
programme.desc: After being chased on horseback by a terrifying, unidentified figure in black, Anne Henderson faces the biggest decision of her life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: An Occurrence at Owl Creek Bridge
programme.desc: A Confederate spy is spared death when the rope meant to hang him miraculously breaks. Or does it?

programme.title: Hot Ones: Awkwafina Gets Hot and Cold While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Awkwafina is the Golden Globe Award-winning actress from films like "Crazy Rich Asians" and "The Farewell."

programme.title: Hot Ones: Danny Brown Has An Orgasm Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Detroit rapper Danny Brown is one of the most requested guests by "Hot Ones" fans.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Chili Klaus Faces the Most Extreme "Hot Ones" Ever
programme.desc: Sean Evans and Chili Klaus have joined forces to eat the world's hottest pepper, the Carolina Reaper.

programme.title: Hot Ones: David Harbour Feels Out of Control While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: David Harbour is an Emmy- and Tony-nominated actor perhaps best known for Netflix's "Stranger Things."

programme.title: Hot Ones: Charlize Theron Takes a Rorschach Test While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: "The Gringo" star Charlize Theron tests her spice credentials against the wings of death!

programme.title: Hot Ones: Noel Gallagher Looks Back in Anger at Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Noel Gallagher is a rock 'n' roll legend from Oasis, currently with Noel Gallagher's High Flying Birds.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Dua Lipa Sweats From Her Eyes While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Dua Lipa is a two-time Grammy Award-winning singer-songwriter.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern is a chef, restaurateur, author and Emmy-winning food TV pioneer.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Quavo Is Stunned by Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Quavo is a rapper, songwriter and record producer you know as one-third of the rap group Migos.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon is a Golden Globe-winning actor who needs six degrees of separation from the spice.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Inventions for holding off a global warming meltdown include giant solar energy towers, a rooftop wind turbine, a car that runs on air and a kite that tows a cargo ship.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The X-1 jet breaks the sound barrier; the X-43 Scramjet flies at Mach 7; U-2 and SR-71 Cold War spy planes; flying Wing bombers; the new F/A Raptor.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Scientists and technicians use cutting-edge forensic technology to unearth identities of perpetrators at the FBI's crime lab at Quantico.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Fertilizer--without it two thirds of the world would starve. It makes our lawns grow greener and our crops grow taller; take a tour of the places where the essential nutrients that feed the soil are harnessed.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Who could imagine life without our "man-made weather"? On cold winter nights and hot summer days, we are forever grateful to the visionaries who took two basic elements--fire and ice--and turned them into true modern marvels.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Dogs are fearless, faithful, determined, and swift, serving as hunters, soldiers, rescuers, and protectors; they are perfectly engineered marvels, combining natural instincts with complex training.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Slovenia: The Crow's Flight
programme.desc: Monty heads to Slovenia to retrace one of the most daring, yet unknown, mass escapes of Allied prisoners during the second world war, made possible only with the help of partisans and locals.

programme.title: Secret War: Double Agent Tricycle
programme.desc: Dusan Popov was almost certainly James Bond. Ian Fleming knew all the stories about him. Popov managed to persuade both the Germans and MI6 to keep him in the style of a millionaire businessman while performing a series of missions against the Nazis.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Time is Blood 1942-5
programme.desc: Episode 2 begins after the desperate German winter of 1941. Yet 1942 began badly for the Soviets, with more vicious Nazi campaigning seeing millions more Russians captured and starved.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: They are iconic weapons: the Tommy Gun, Uzi, and today’s MP5. Invented to break WWI stalemates, the submachine gun revolutionized warfare and culture. Host Wil Willis explores its evolution, firing the Thompson and BAR.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Liberation & Revenge
programme.desc: 1945 frigjør soldater fra den Røde Hæren Auschwitz-Birkenau. Når andre befrielsene finner sted i de påfølgende månedene, blir verden sjokkert.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Dårlig stemning i butikken
programme.desc: Freddies nye drømmejobb i Pear Store blir et mareritt når Sam også blir ansatt. Imens prøver Carly å bli inviteret ut av en fra Pear Store, og Spencer må melde seg til frivillig jobb på den lokale brannstasjonen.

programme.title: iCarly: Halloween
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen holder en "Halfoween"-fest, for de syns at det skal være Halloween to ganger i året. Men da en forkledd gjest spiller Carly og vennene et puss, blir festen litt for vill.

programme.title: iCarly: Chucks lillebror
programme.desc: Et sinna barn ønsker inderlig å hevne seg, men målskiven Spencer prøver iherdig å stoppe ham. Gibby blir knust når hans nye lekelaserpistol går i stykker, men blir fra seg av henrykkelse når Freddies reparsjion gir den overraskende krefter.

programme.title: iCarly: Utestengt
programme.desc: Når Carly bannlyser T-Bo fra hennes og Spencers hjem, hevner han seg ved å ikke slippe Carly inn på Groovy Smoothie. Imens oppdager Freddie og Gibby at det fins mange fordeler ved å spille i band...og også et par ulemper.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Las Vegas
programme.desc: Når Sam får vite at moren hennes er i fengsel i Vegas, bestemmer gjengen seg for å ta sine mest verdifulle eiendeler, kjøre til Vegas og pantsette dem - så de får nok penger til å betale borgen for henne. Gjesteartister: History Channels PAWN STARS.

programme.title: iCarly: Nattsynbrillene
programme.desc: Sams venn kommer ut av ungdomsfengselet, og Sam advarer alle om å holde seg unna, men Carly hører ikke etter og havner på dypt vann. Hjemme i leiligheten finner Spencer noen nattsynbriller.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 1
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York. De elsker New York og er kjempeglade for å være med i programmet, men alt kan skje på live tv.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 2
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York, men en stor klesmiss fra Gibby betyr store problemer for nettshowets fremtid.

programme.title: iCarly: Spencers venner
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen vil finne venner til Spencer på hans egen alder. De finner noen gode muligheter, men vil vennskapet blomstre?

programme.title: iCarly: Den stjålne laptoppen
programme.desc: Når Sams laptop blir stjålet, prøver iCarly-gjengen å hjelpe henne med å oppspore tyven. Imens får Spencer vite at han ikke får komme inn i sin yndlingsspillehall hvis han ikke er i følge med et barn. Hellet snur når Guppy trenger barnevakt.

programme.title: iCarly: Farvel del 2
programme.desc: Carly er på vei til å akseptere at hun ikke kan gå på det årlige ballet, da faren hennes dukker opp og går sammen med henne. Kvelden tar en uventet vending når faren hennes stiller et livsavgjørende spørsmål.

programme.title: Totally Turtles
