programme.desc: På en surfetur til Costa Rica, gjør Kristin Brody sjalu ved å rote med en lokal bartender, Audrina prøver å bekjempe hennes tiltrekning til Justin, og Stephanie finner seg selv på kant med jungelmiljøet.

programme.title: The Hills: Loves Me Not
programme.desc: Kristin har en åpenthjertig samtale med Brody, hun ønsker å gi forholdet en ny sjanse. Heidis mor kommer til LA, i håp om å forsone seg med henne. Lo og kjæresten hennes feirer sitt jubileum, og Stephanie begynner å date en ny.

programme.title: The Hills: All Good Things...
programme.desc: Kristin står overfor en stor avgjørelse som også påvirker Brody. Audrina slår opp med Justin. Lo vet ikke om hun er klar til å ta neste skritt med hennes kjæreste og Stephanie mener hun har endelig funnet sann lykke.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I Don't Hold Grudges... JK!
programme.desc: Det er en ny begynnelse for den ikoniske vennegruppen da de kommer tilbake til The Hills og tar opp kontakten etter mange år. Nye utfordringer, gamle feider og romanser kolliderer. Fortiden er nemlig ikke alltid i fortiden.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Not My Family
programme.desc: Stephanie forsøker å reparere forholdet til boren, Spencer. Mischa treffer Perez Hilton, som mobbet henne da hun var skuespiller. Gnisten mellom Audrina og Justin fortsetter å ulme, men Justin kan ha fått øye for noen annen også.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: A Legend in His Own Mind
programme.desc: Audrina får sjokkerende informasjon om Justin Bobby, og tvinges til å etterprøve motivene hans. Sinnene koker når Spencer og Heidi stiller spørsmålstegn ved sitt forhold til Brody. Brandon Thomas Lee arrangere en bassengfest hos sin mor.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Not to Eavesdrop, But to Eavesdrop
programme.desc: Audrina konfronterer Justin med at han nektet å ha kysset henne. Brody klager over forholdet til faren, til Caitlyn, og sin forhenværende bestevenn, Spencer. Spencer og Heidis forhold settes på prøve når de kjemper med å få firmaet til å vokse.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Caught Red Velvet Handed
programme.desc: Daniel gjør et klossete forsøk på en kjærlighetsforbindelse. Varmen stiger i "Sauna of Secrets" for en utro singel. Den første eksen ises ut av sommrhuset.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: De Niall Is Not Just an Ex
programme.desc: Marlon får mange eksers oppmerksomhet og Adore er mindre glad for det. En sjarmerende overraskelse avbryter "the Hot Date".

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Boo Years Eve!
programme.desc: "Sauna of Secrets" avslører et mysterie for Marlons eks. To singler slåss om den samme eksen. Tingene går varme under Ice Ceremony når en eks foretar et overraskende trekk.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: The Bird Has Landed
programme.desc: Georgia og Callums forhold settes på prøve når den eksen de frykter mest dukker opp. Spenningen gnistrer over La Demis siste kjærlighet. En romantisk Hot Date blir belønnet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: SOS, Save Our Singles
programme.desc: En sjokkerende "Sauna of Secrets" betyr at singlene må passe seg under "Ice Ceremony". Allie og Nialls av og på-forhold gjør at Allie havner på gyngende grunn.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Ex-Cuzzi
programme.desc: En perfekt date blir til et perfekt mareritt for et par. Niall får seriøs konkurranse om Allies hengivenhet. Marlon og La Demi kjemper for å finne ut av situasjon-forholdet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Mums the Word
programme.desc: Georgia og Callum møter sine verste kritikere. Marlon fanges mellom en stein og en varmt sted da en eks som eventyrer forholdet hansmed La Demi ankommer. Ice Ceremony tar en uventet vri.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Jake's Buick Century.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Tad's Land Rover Range Rover.

programme.title: Are You The One?: This is Nuts-a
programme.desc: Brett må svare for seg når han angrer på følelsene sine overfor Nutsa. Huset er i krisetilstand når de prøver å finne ut av hvem som er de rette parene.

programme.title: Are You The One?: It All Comes Down To This
programme.desc: Asia prøver å sabotere Sams forhold med Daniel. Huset får en siste sjanse til å vinne kjærlighet og penger og en ekstra dag til å rydde opp i uenighetene.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Reunion The Final Matchup
programme.desc: Etter uker på leting etter kjærligheten og spill om penger, møtes deltagerne fra sesong syv igjen for å gi innsideinformasjon om eksplosive øyeblikk, sladre om dramaet bak scenen, og avsløre hva som skjedde etter at de forlot huset.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Come One, Come All Part 1
programme.desc: For aller første gang er kjærligheten ubegrenset og alle er en mulighet. 16 singler ankommer Hawaii for å finne kjærlighet og vinne 1 million dollar.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Come One, Come All Part 2
programme.desc: Det er allerede trøbbel i paradis for de sterkeste parene. Et par kjemper for å skulle kunne ha et åpent forhold. Kjærlighetstriangler gjenoppstår.

programme.title: Are You The One?: This is Trash
programme.desc: Justin havner i klem mellom en som vil ha ham og en usikker. Basit kjemper for å bli akseptert. Huset opplever noen ubekvemme sannheter.

programme.title: Are You The One?: We Come to Slay
programme.desc: Etter homoballet er huset i et eksakt og billedlig kaos. Dramatisk sminke betyr slutten for to par. Dionne Slay ankommer.

programme.title: MTV Teen Mom
programme.desc: Opplev de dramatiske øyeblikkene når de unge mødrene takler hverdagslige utfordringer eller opplever uforglemmelige øyeblikk. Det er uavbrutt drama hele dagen, hver dag.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Two teams are combined into one, and each chef is given one main ingredient and asked to create a dish suitable to chef Ramsay's palate; during the dinner service, the chefs have difficulty getting food out to the patrons.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs are challenged to teach cooking-impaired housewives how to make a gourmet meal; chefs Mark Peel and Ben Ford treat the challenge winner to a one-on-one course; the chefs struggle to balance a dozen appetisers, entrées and desserts.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final four chefs prepare a special luncheon for 80 pregnant women, who choose their favourite dish and send the winner on a $1,000 shopping spree; during the dinner service, one chef gets careless and burns chef Ramsay's hand.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay invites the final three chefs and a few special guests to a breakfast he prepared, and asks the chefs to recreate a signature dish; the chefs each take a turn running the hot plate during the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final two chefs are rewarded with a trip to New York, where they are asked to prepare their signature dishes; the chefs must prove their skill and passion by designing and running their own restaurants; Whoopi Goldberg makes an appearance.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Tordenens sønner
programme.desc: Texas Ranger Cordell Walker hjelper en av sine tidligere "Spark dop ut av Amerika"-elever med å bli en mann og finne sitt oppdrag i livet etter at faren plutselig dør.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Texas mot Cahill
programme.desc: Alex blir funnet til sengs med en død mann, og avtrykkene hennes er på våpenet som drepte ham. Det er opp til faren hennes, Gordon Cahill, å forsvare henne i retten.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walkers tidligere elev uteksamineres fra politiakademiet, og Walker velger å gi ham et viktig, men vanskelig oppdrag: å ødelegge doplangeres planer om å dele ut gratis heroin på skolene.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: De kjempende McLains
programme.desc: Etter at Walker fanger en desertert marineoffiser, JW McLain, som er besatt av å ta hevn over Jack Garrett, mannen som drepte storesøsteren hans, klarer McLain å rømme.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Ismannen
programme.desc: Walker oppdager at vennen hans, den tidligere straffedømte Charlie Brooks, er helt lik Iceman, og han overtaler Charlie til å spille ham i et forsøk på å avslutte mafiabossens terrorvelde.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness

programme.title: Jersey Shore: That's How The Shore Goes
programme.desc: Ronnie slipper ut, og Snooki får trøst etter et møte med eksen. Gjengen tar farvel med The Shore, men ikke uten en siste tur i boblebadet.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Nelly, Russel Simmons, O-Town
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Nelly, Russel Simmons, O-Town.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Laura Prepon, James King, Devon Sawa
programme.desc: Tour the homes of the hottest new stars from the movie Slackers. Features tours of the homes of James King, Laura Prepon and Devon Sawa.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Jason Kidd, Damon Soudamire, Jerry Stackhouse
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Jason Kidd, Damon Soudamire, Jerry Stackhouse.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Cash Money Millionaires, Ali Landry, Ricky Williams
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Cash Money Millionaires, Ali Landry, Ricky Williams.

programme.title: Made: Moto-X
programme.desc: Kaitlin Smith wants to shed her girly girl reputation and find her inner strength by being MADE into a rough and tough motocross racer!

programme.title: Made: Basketball Player
programme.desc: Kenneth is a dancing diva who's determined to gain the acceptance of his military father by being Made into a basketball player.

programme.title: Made: Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: Ben has no luck in love and is hoping to be MADE into the Perfect Boyfriend.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blind
programme.desc: An F.B.I. man is blinded while investigating a crime syndicate attempting to take over a large chemical plant. Jim Phelps undergoes a delicate eye operation so as to appear convincingly blind when he poses as the sightless man.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encore
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as an aging hoodlum who is artificially transplanted back to the 1930s and the scene of his unsolved crime.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Tram
programme.desc: The leaders of two underworld factions call a top-level meeting at a ski resort to set up a financial holding company capable of creating chaos within the national economy.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Mindbend
programme.desc: To help the IMF team break up a crime syndicate that specializes in brainwashing ex-convicts into committing political assassinations, Barney substitutes for a former prisoner looking for an operation to give himself a new appearance.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Shape-Up
programme.desc: Guest stars Gerald S. O'Loughlin and Christopher Stone portray crime syndicate bosses in charge of the waterfront who extort huge sums of money from every ship docking at a west coast port.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 502
programme.desc: Anita og Martins to barn har tatt over hjemmet, og det er leker overalt. Løsningen er et større hjem, men paret har ikke klart å finne det rette huset enda. Nå får de hjelp av ekspertene, men det blir ikke lett.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 503
programme.desc: Tina og Danni solgte rekkehuset sitt i den tro at de snart skulle finne det rette huset. Men sånn gikk det ikke. Paret er utrolig kresne, og har høye krav. Kan ekspertene skape hjemmet som Tina og Danni drømmer om?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 504
programme.desc: Laura og Jesper og Jespers to barn leier i Humlebæk, og de er mildt sagt lei av det. De mangler plass, hage - og de vil også ha barn sammen snart. Men to års husjakt har ikke gitt resultat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Gothenburg on the west coast of Sweden has recently been discovered as an exciting destination by both international travel journalists and food bloggers. Tareq tracks down an old army barracks which has been converted into a world class cheese factory.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Luleå
programme.desc: Tareq visits Luleå, home to the beautiful Tree Hotel: a collection of treehouses built by an award winning architect. Following the river further up into the mountains he reaches the land where, for centuries, the Sami people kept their reindeer herds.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Halmstad
programme.desc: In Halmstad Tareq explores the contrast between the busy summer scene at the beach and the quiet rural country life, meeting Jörgen Persson: award winning table tennis player and visiting a village famous for its cheese.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kemi
programme.desc: Kemi is situated in northern Finland by the Bothnian Bay and it is part of Lapland region. Tareq tries his luck at a spot of burbot fishing on the frozen sea and visits the snow castle hotel.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Situated on the west coast of Sweden, Bohuslän is a place where you can really feel the history of fishing all around a tradition that is still active. Tareq will be harvesting supreme quality oysters and lobsters and cook some wonderful seafood dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Florø
programme.desc: Tareq visits Norway and Florø to celebrate their national day -17th of May. Surrounded by breathtaking archipelagos and stunning fjords he dives for scallops in the north sea, cooking at mountain peaks and exploring the history of norwegian salmon

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia
programme.desc: Tareq makes his way across the baltic sea to Estonia and the capital Tallinn. He discovers the historical treasures of the city and its thriving culinary life before he heads out into the vast and beautiful countryside and the national park of Soomaa.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Ringkøbing
programme.desc: Ringkøbing, a lovely old market town located at the west coast of Denmark. Here, Tareq visit a traditional Herring Festival and meets up with local entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever-changing environment.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Geordie Fest
programme.desc: Familien feirer Abbies 21-årsdag med den ultimate hjemmefesten, og selvsagt er Abbies bestemor invitert! Familien tar et følsomt farvel når tiden deres opphører.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: All Change In The House
programme.desc: Geordies er tilbake! Denne gangen setter Anna og Scotty-T fart i tingene, og kaster inn fire nykommere. Disse gjør sitt beste for å passe inn og leve bra, men gamlingene er stadig på plass for å vise dem hvordan en skal feste skikkelig.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Nathan Needs A House Party
programme.desc: Nathan når bunnpunktet og familien vil arrangere en fest for å få opp stemningen. Sophie savner kjæresten mens nykommerne flytter inn hos Geordie-familien. Abbie ødelegger mellom Beau og Bethan.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Beau & Bethan Get It On!
programme.desc: Nathan og Chloe er ikke på noe bra sted, og jentene vorser uten å invitere ham. Til tross for å ikke ville gå inn i et forhold, er Beau naturlig tiltrukket av Bethan og de gjør det.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Buckle Up! The Geordies Hit Belfast!
programme.desc: Anna sier til gjengen at de skal til Belfast. Geordies kjører hardt på Nord-Irland og gleder seg over hva byen har å tilby. Tahlia tar til og med en kelner! Men tingene skjærer seg da Chloe og Sams forhold når bunnen og de slår opp.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Family Is Rocked!
programme.desc: Geordiene er tilbake i tegnefilm, og får sjokk da et kjent fjes kommer tilbake. Bethan og Beau settes på prøve mens Chloes og Sams forhold holder på å bli bedre. Sophie må fatte et vanskelig valg.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike truer med å fortelle Jose om Angelina og Vinny. Vinnys familie kommer på besøk. Og Vinny og Pauly finner drømmejentene, men en vil få knust hjertet sitt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Dirty Pad
programme.desc: Angelina er i trøbbel når gjengen får vite at hun lå med Jose etter en natt med Vin. Men den siste dråpen kommer når Mike oppdager flere ubehageligheter på badet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Gone, Baby, Gone
programme.desc: Mike gjenforens med sin kanadiske skjønnhet, til stor underholdning for hele huset. Angelina forteller gjengen hva hun syns om dem, noe som gjør Snooki rasende og får begeret til å flyte over.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Girls Like That
programme.desc: Vinny velger mellom to grupper jenter. Siden Angelina er borte vil Snooki at hun og Jenni skal skvære opp med Sam. Gleden blir kortvarig for Snooki, når Mike blir stadig mer fiendtlig.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Deja Vu All Over Again
programme.desc: Alle er frustrerte over Mike - han får gjengen sparket ut av en klubben, får bilen tauet vekk, brenner nesten ned huset og svikter Pauly. To ganger.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back into the Fold
programme.desc: Pauly og Vin har sine siste dater med Miami-jentene, mens Sam og Ron raskt havner i krangel. Jenni lager bråk mellom Pauly og Mike, og det blir en siste kveld full av drama i boblebadet.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Hollow Men
programme.desc: Vincent witnesses their latest murder and is unable to stop them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: What Rough Beast
programme.desc: Catherine is attacked in the park by two men disguised as policemen.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ceremony of Innocence
programme.desc: Following the death of investigative reporter, Bernie Spirko, Elliot Burch and Catherine set out to find the man who hired and killed Spirko.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Rest Is Silence…
programme.desc: Following the ordeal with Paracelcus, Vincent moves forward toward a stress-aggravated mental collapse. Vincent continues to come to terms with the beast in himself and finds himself losing control of his thoughts.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Though Lovers Be Lost...
programme.desc: Catherine reaches Vincent in the catacomb and rescues Vincent from his madness. However, as Vincent begins to recover, he realizes he has lost his bond with Catherine and is unable to sense when she is in danger.

programme.title: JAG: Good Intentions
programme.desc: Mac defends a petty officer and former alcoholic accused of a brutal murder after a drinking binge which renders him useless in remembering details that could help him. Roberts is entangled in the case of a Navy Commander accused of embezzling funds.

programme.title: JAG: People vs SECNAV
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: JAG: Hard Time
programme.desc: Mac must accompany a prisoner who once assaulted her across the country while Harm and Bud delve into the case of an HIV-infected fleet officer who, after having his condition revealed and relegated to inactive duty, wants his old job back.

programme.title: JAG: Coming Home
programme.desc: A marine’s killing in Iraq has ramifications for JAG stateside as Harm helps the soldier’s family with a media onslaught, and Bud and Mac investigate the failure of his flack vest.

programme.title: JAG: Fighting Words
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Ages Of Man / Families / Bo 'N Sam
programme.desc: Julie ends up in the middle of an unusual love triangle when the visiting 13-year-old son of the head of the cruise line develops a crush on her at the same time that she is trying to win over a charming older passenger.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Sounds Of Silence / Cyrano De Bricker / Murder On The High Seas
programme.desc: A singer tries to persuade his manager to let him abandon the shock tactics that made him famous and let his music speak for itself.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Super Mom / I'll See You Again / April's Return
programme.desc: One-time stowaway April Lopez returns to the ship as a popular singer. However, she grows tired of the hassles of fame and decides that she would like to become a cruise director.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Third Wheel / Grandmother's Day / Second String Mom
programme.desc: Gopher gives his parents a cruise as a Mother's Day present. Gopher's father grows jealous of the close relationship between mother and son.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Carol & Doug’s Story, Part 1
programme.desc: Julie catches love fever on the high seas and is thinking of marriage when the Pacific Princess is chartered for a dazzling star-studded wedding cruise that takes Capt. Stubing, his crew, and their guests on a beautiful scenic journey to Alaska.

programme.title: Happy Days: Nose is for News
programme.desc: To prove to his college journalism professor that he has what it takes to be a good investigative reporter, Richie gets down and dirty to expose who's behind an illegal garbage collection scheme.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Fair Fonzie
programme.desc: Snobby Cynthia Holmes schemes with her obnoxious cousin, Skippy, to make the Fonz look foolish at a country club soirée.

programme.title: Happy Days: Bye Bye Blackball
programme.desc: Richie, Ralph, and Potsie endure the harassment of "hell week" to prove themselves worthy to enter their college fraternity, Phi Kappa Nu.

programme.title: Happy Days: Joanie's First Kiss
programme.desc: Sophomore Joanie Cunningham gets basic back-seat defense tips from Richie and Fonzie before her first "car date" with a senior boy, and then cramps her older brother's style when she and her date show up at his college "make-out" party.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Almost Dies
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: MacGyver: Hellfire
programme.desc: Rugged MacGyver plunges through poisonous gas, an exploding oil derrick and the hell of fire when he tries to help an old friend hit black gold.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Prodigal
programme.desc: MacGyver's skills are stretched to the limit in trying to keep an underworld figure from killing his own brother before the man can testify against him in court.

programme.title: MacGyver: Target MacGyver
programme.desc: When MacGyver is told to get out of town fast because assassins are after him, he has a bittersweet reunion with his grandfather who he hasn't seen in years.

programme.title: MacGyver: Death Lock
programme.desc: MacGyver plays a deadly game against a double agent who uses the world's most sophisticated electronic equipment in an attempt to silence MacGyver for good.

programme.title: MacGyver: Nightmares
programme.desc: MacGyver fights for his life as he struggles to recover a list of terrorists on pirated microfilm after he has been injected with a deadly serum.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Matlock: The Arsonist
programme.desc: An arsonist is about to torch Matlock’s favorite men’s store and one of the owners will become Matlock’s next case after his partner is murdered.

programme.title: Matlock: The Formula
programme.desc: Misplaced loyalties make Jonathan Duvall the prime suspect for robbery and murder when he attempts to right alleged wrongs against his mentor.

programme.title: Matlock: The Trial (Part 1)
programme.desc: When an Assistant District Attorney is murdered, Matlock is asked to switch sides and act as Special Prosecutor for the state of Georgia.

programme.title: Matlock: The Trial (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock’s investigation as the state’s Special Prosecutor uncovers a judicial conspiracy involving two judges and a corporate lawyer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Accident
programme.desc: Matlock’s client is accused of killing his ambulance-chasing lawyer who specializes in cases of personal injury – especially when the injuries occur at a local amusement park.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse is attracted to a beautiful psychic, who also happens to be the prime suspect in a murder. Amanda copes with the trials of motherhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The daughter of one of Mark's friends writes a juicy tell-all expose of the most prominent public figures. Mark takes her in after a crazed stalker starts threatening her and her co-authors.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark investigates a perky morning television personality for the murder of a Howard Stern-like radio host.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan is the executor of his friend, Preston Michael's, estate after Michaels is found in the body of a shark.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A friendly-fire incident involving a veteran cop leaves Steve's friend dead, but the shooting only appears to be unintentional.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Somebody's Wifey's In Town
programme.desc: Pauly tar med Nikki på en familiemiddag, og gjengen holder pusten når Deena og Angelina havner ansikt til ansikt for første gang på ti måneder. Men Vinnys bryske kommentar om bryllupstale kan få alt til å spore av.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Return of JWOWW
programme.desc: Angelina og Deena har begravd stridsøksene, og familieferien kan offisielt begynne. Men da Jenni kommer endrer det alt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Note 2.0
programme.desc: JWOWW og Angelina setter p-en i pinlig under en familiemiddag. Etterpå er de i villrede, så Ronnie får en gjentjeneste av Dr. Drew. Kanskje han kan hjelpe til å forene familien igjen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Calling Dr. Drew
programme.desc: Dr. Drew megler i Angelina og Jennis konflikt. Og rotet er i ferd med å forverre seg da Deena oppdager at hennes private samtale med Mike ikke var så privat. Mike og Lauren får sine livs beste nyheter.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Wedding Redo
programme.desc: RSVP planlegger Angelinas bryllup igjen. Onkel Nino forretter og Vinny holder bryllupstalen. Hva kan gå galt?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Speech Pt. 3
programme.desc: Ti måneder etter at en brudepikes tale nesten ødela familien får Angelina bryllupet sitt. Mike prøver å holde på hemmeligheten til etter festen.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: What can the Prince of Pasta do with giant lobster in this battle against Makoto Osada?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: This non-traditional battle of sushi between Morimoto and Keiji Nakazawa is sure to please.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The rare black pork is brought out as the equalizer between Sakai and Isao Makio.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Morimoto takes on Michael Noble in the battle of potato.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Sakai and the new Iron Chef French battle with Chen and the new Iron Chef Chinese. Watch this French vs. Chinese showdown with three theme ingredients!

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hva som skjer når du ikke lander støtt i 'Ustø landing', sjekker de mest lojale kjærestene i 'Jeg er opptatt' og avslutter med uheldige campere i 'Glamourløs camping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med stil idet de 'Flyr over styret', spaserer på løs grunn i 'Fallgulv' og drar for å gjøre innkjøp altfor sent i 'Grubutikken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' hogger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ned trær med noen 'Tømmerflopper', får seg noen 'Luftige-svev-madrasser' og har det kjempekult på 'Rockeførskolen'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' havner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood i 'Faresoner', avklarer ulike situasjoner av 'Glassknas' og oppnår betydelig høyde med 'Flygebiler'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood ufokuserte fedre med 'Distraherte pappahjerner', driver høyt spill i golf med 'Djerv gjenvinning' og viser sine fiseferdigheter når de utfører 'Gasstriks'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppsummerer Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood kostnadene ved å ha barn i 'Dyre barn', snubler over sirkusartister som lager 'Plutselig sirkus' og opplever slitsomme feiringer med 'Dårlige bursdager'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' denger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hodet i veggen som første trekk i 'Kraftskaller', ødelegger golfutstyret sitt i 'På tide med nye køller' og møter farene ved å benytte 'Samkjøring om natten'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' utforsker Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood ildidrettens verden i 'Flammesport', finner ut hvor farlige dører kan være i 'Helt av hengslene' og blir overrasket over noen svært 'Uventede raketter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood inn i ubevegelige gjenstander i 'Parkert smerte', oppdager at trafikkflyten kan påvirkes av bisarre årsaker i 'Motorveiforsinkelser' og opplever farene ved 'Olme okser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' støter Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på farlige voltere uten 'Saltobevissthet', opplever smerten ved knuste tohjulinger i Billigsykler' og oppdager at heis og fyll ikke går så godt sammen i 'Heisa-heistur'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Kaos og stillheten i det
programme.desc: Dylan, Rhade og Beka jobber sammen for å redde Trance fra Methus-2 og Harper fra general Burma.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjertet av reisen (del 1)
programme.desc: Mannskapet gjør det endelig ut av Seefra-systemet og oppdager at Dylan er den siste Paradine.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjertet av reisen (del 2)
programme.desc: Den siste kampen for å redde New Systems Commonwealth begynner.

programme.title: Andromeda: Under natten
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt igjen strandet i nærheten av et svart hull, blir kaptein Dylan Hunt oppdaget av et leiesoldat bergingsskip og finner at han har vært frossen i tide i 300 år.

programme.title: Andromeda: En bekreftende flamme
programme.desc: Dylan beskytter Andromeda mot leiesoldater mens Beka begynner å lure på om de kjemper for feil side.

programme.title: Andromeda: Å miste den skjebnesvangre lynet
programme.desc: Dylan finner en romstasjon full av barn som tror at han er der for å bringe fred ved å drepe fiendene sine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: In 1995, Palm Beach waitress Denise O'Neill is abducted and murdered. Her neighbor Luis Caballero arouses suspicions by behaving oddly towards TV crews covering the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: In 2007, Shamaia Smith disappears from a strip club in East Hartford, CT. Police consider various patrons of the club, but focus on local businessman Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: In 2000, Christina Sanoubane was murdered in her Cedar Rapids apartment after moving away from her abusive boyfriend. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: In 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen received threatening emails and then disappeared. Tracking the source of the emails led police to the home of Daphne Wright, where they believe a murder was committed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: When Kristine Fitzhugh failed to show up for her music class, her husband found her dead at the bottom of the stairs of their Palo Alto home. Further investigation reveals evidence of murder in the kitchen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: In 1999, Susan Fassett was gunned down as she left her church choir practice in Poughkeepsie, NY. After clearing her husband, police turned their attention to Fred Andros, with whom Susan had an affair.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: Responding to a 2008 garage fire, Illinois emergency response discovered a man crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: In 2007, the Florida mobile home of Effie and Michael Ratley catches fire. Michael heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is found beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: In 2005, David Castor suffered a slow, agonizing death over a period of days. His wife maintained it was suicide, even though it was done with antifreeze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: In the 1990s, the media dubbed Richard Rogers the "Last Call Killer" because he targeted men in gay bars who were obviously intoxicated.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kay Hall, Mail Bombings, Trish's Miracle, Powers of Katie and Best Friends.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 14
programme.desc: This episode includes: Motorcycle Murder, Amber Swartz, Carlos' Con, Maine Petition, Message in a Bottle and Foster Son.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: R.F. Kennedy (Pts. 1 & 2), Gurdon Light, Tina's Search, Where's Baby Le-Zhan and Doggie Bowser MD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 16
programme.desc: This episode includes: Who Killed Jeanine? (Pts. 1 & 2), Animal Saviors, Bus Stop Amnesia, Point Blank and Miriam's Memory.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 17
programme.desc: This episode includes: Murder in Agawam, Murdered Mom, Missing Baby, Dropped Off Doe, Hotel Balcony Death, She Sold Babies and Genius Mystery.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The C-11 Squad
programme.desc: New York City is not stranger to gang violence. But when a 12-year-old child was kidnapped, the gangs had crossed a line. Law enforcement raced to find the missing boy before it was too late.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death In The Delta
programme.desc: When a wealthy young woman was abducted in front of her in-laws' home, the police had no shortage of suspects. The 25-year-old victim left behind a tumultuous marriage, an ex-husband and old boyfriends. All were on the FBI's short list.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Human Prey
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: In a small Ohio community, an elderly woman and a teenaged boy disappeared. Because they vanished within hours of each other, police believed the cases were linked. But they didn't know how.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Medical Examiners's Casebook
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims. And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder. These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Killers
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Body Count
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Obsessions
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Abduction
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear, kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Full House at Northwich Plaza and Bingo Hall
programme.desc: Bex and Sean head into Northwich, Cheshire to investigate a disused bingo hall. Bex braves a lone vigil, which she will never forget as a door seemingly opens on its own.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Streets
programme.desc: Hidden underground for years in Keighley West Yorkshire. Ghost Dimension investigate haunted Victorian Streets, used during the war as bombing shelters.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The House of The Devil
programme.desc: The island of Gran Canaria houses some of the most haunted buildings in the world and tonight the team fly to the island and investigate claims of satanic worship and paranormal activity in a house that is believed to have been built by the Devil himself

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Spirits in command at Welkin Mill
programme.desc: Sean heads into Stockport, Greater Manchester and travels to Welkin Mill. He investigates claims of paranormal activity which also appear to be linked to his previous investigation of Moviescape.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Factory - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean and Bex investigate their deadliest and most haunted location: The Factory. Whatever lurks inside, has the power to shake an entire building. Dark forces are hiding within the location and expose themselves on tonight’s investigation!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: This Should Be Explosive...
programme.desc: Katrina believes her sister Kendra’s boyfriend is a cheater and having sex with her best friend Nay-Nay! Later, John returns to the stage with a shocking update!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do You Need a Medic or Are You Guilty?
programme.desc: Michelle needs answers about who hurt her daughter. She will stop at nothing to protect her baby. Will the father James clear his name on Steve's stage?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA: Don't Run From the Results
programme.desc: Roberta suspects that her husband Bryan has been cheating. They both believe the other is cheating. Find out whether these men are really the father on today's Steve Wilkos!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did
programme.desc: Shannan claims Tim fathered her child. He doesn't buy it because he doesn't recall having sex with her! Later, Ayana is furious that her boyfriend Patrick denies their son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
programme.desc: Is Khadisa's boyfriend Chad cheating on her with her own sister? Will Maya's ex trust her and her current beau with their infant son?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
programme.desc: Will Nadia and Woody's lie detector test results prove that they were negligent and deserved to lose custody of their children? Then, can Steve set the record straight about Josette's daughter?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The 1,000th Episode!
programme.desc: On the 1,000th episode, we'll bring you all of the crazy confessions, explosive meltdowns, chair throws, funny moments and the heartfelt stories that have made this show special!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: With Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home. Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood On the Tracks
programme.desc: When an unsuspecting train conductor discovers a decapitated body on a lonely stretch of track, Lt. Joe Kenda must unravel the mystery of his death.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Make My Day
programme.desc: When Keith Andrews is killed, a man steps forward claiming he did it in self-defense—but Lt. Joe Kenda has his doubts.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: .357 Magnum
programme.desc: The murder of a popular teen at a crowded house party sends Kenda down a winding road paved with lies, misdirection, and innuendo.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shot Through the Heart
programme.desc: 15yr old Chuck returns home from school to find his mother, Betty Limbrick, shot dead on the floor. Evidence points to a robbery gone wrong, but Kenda uncovers a plot almost too shocking to believe.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Robert Durst: Nobody Tells the Whole Truth (Part 2)
programme.desc: The unbelievable story of Robert Durst, the millionaire heir to a vast real estate fortune who has been living under a cloud of suspicion for decades.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: A License to Kill (Part 1)
programme.desc: For nearly two decades, Michael Swango, a physician-turned-murderer, left a trail of death and mayhem across two continents. Suspicious illnesses and deaths followed him from hospital to hospital.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: For nearly two decades, Michael Swango, a physician-turned-murderer, left a trail of death and mayhem across two continents. Suspicious illnesses and deaths followed him from hospital to hospital.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hunting Human Beings (Part 1)
programme.desc: The Golden State Killer invaded homes, tortured and terrorized families, committed fifty brutal rapes and thirteen vicious murders, and was on the loose for forty-four years.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: The Golden State Killer invaded homes, tortured and terrorized families, committed fifty brutal rapes and thirteen vicious murders, and was on the loose for forty-four years.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Mystery of Oak Island
programme.desc: Richard investigates Canada's best-known mysteries, the Oak Island treasure. Also known as the money pit, the site has become one of the world's deepest and most costly archaeological digs.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Carnfield Hall
programme.desc: Carnfield Hall is a country house dating from the 15th and 16th Centuries. This private residence turn event hall is using its paranormal activity to draw in business. Are these spirits the old residents?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Tutbury Castle
programme.desc: The team head to Tutbury Castle in Derbyshire to investigate the paranormal reports at the location. Past Hunters appear to have caught the Tutbury Ghost on camera.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Ordsall Hall
programme.desc: Ordsall Hall is over 820 years old. It has been put to many uses including a family home, working men's club and church hall. With over 15 hauntings and many sightings, Ordsall Hall will certainly keep the team busy.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Don't Go Upstairs and Swerve
programme.desc: Two brothers discover a horrifying secret when they inherit a relative's home. A school teacher struggles to learn the identity of the child-like spirit that's stalking her.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Midnight Flight
programme.desc: Germania, ca. 400 e.Kr.: en gjenstand kalt Gunther's Scepter er forseglet i et hvelv. Kleine Burgh, 2001: Sydney og Nigel blir ansatt for å finne det ved hjelp av en krystall og en steintavle.

programme.title: Between Worlds
programme.desc: Oscar-vinner Nicolas Cage er tilbake som Joe, en mann som er besatt av ulykken som drepte hans kone og datter. På en bensinstasjon på en ensom motorvei møter Joe Julie, en kvinne med spiritistiske evner...

programme.title: Andromeda: Dyrets mage
programme.desc: Et mytologisk rommonster prøver å spise Andromeda.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ridderen, døden og djevelen
programme.desc: Dylan prøver å frigjøre en flåte med fangede skip, men flåten er ikke sikker på at den vil bli frigjort. AI-ene deres frykter at nye kapteiner vil slavebinde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Immaculate Perception
programme.desc: Genitter angriper Tyrs kone og koloni.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Camp

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Frozen Solid

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Power Crash

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Breakdown
programme.desc: Co-pilot Graeme's fumbles his Electra training landings. Chris stresses over his C-46 check ride. Adam rescues a stranded C-46.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Seth MacFarlane & Liz Gillies, Drew’s Surprise For Family Who Adopted 5 Siblings, The Weekender
programme.desc: Seth MacFarlane and Liz Gillies on their new album. Drew surprises Andi & Thomas Bonura, parents of three, who adopted five siblings after hearing they were separated in different foster homes. Drew gives a list of her favorite picks in “The Weekender.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: "The Witches" Star Stanley Tucci, "Hubie Halloween" Star Noah Schnapp

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew’s Never Have I Ever Hour, First Date After Divorce

programme.title: Cops: Visiting Hours Twofer
programme.desc: Police respond to a report of prostitution in a hospital parking lot. A man and woman engaged in solicitation are pulled over. A woman in an area known for prostitution tries to evade police.

programme.title: Cops: Ignorance is an Excuse
programme.desc: Two men engage in a fist fight on the street over an alleged robbery. A couple claim that they didn't know the car they are driving was stolen.

programme.title: Cops: Checked Luggage
programme.desc: Agents of the US Customs and Border Protection pursue a vehicle. Border agents spot two undocumented people. Airport Customs detains a man when agents suspect he might be carrying more than luggage.

programme.title: Cops: Uncomfortable Shoes
programme.desc: A driver takes police on a neighborhood chase. Officers are called to capture a 12-foot python hiding outside a home. Officers suspect a motorist with a funny walk is hiding something up his shoe.

programme.title: Cops: In-Law Problems
programme.desc: US Marshals are tasked with finding a young boy that has been kidnapped for ransom. A man suspected of dealing contraband is turned in by his ex-girlfriends mother.

programme.title: Cops: Set Some Boundaries
programme.desc: A couple gets into a fight with their in-laws when they attempt to take their baby on a 3am drive. A man is attacked by his roommate after he gets 'too friendly' with a woman in the home.

programme.title: Cops: Invisible Intruders
programme.desc: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he's just trying to return the vehicle.. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.

programme.title: Cops: Dance Fighting
programme.desc: A dispute inside a nightclub turns into a street fight. A man patrols his neighborhood 'Old West' style. A K-9 unit is called in to track a burglar on the run.

programme.title: Cops: Do Not Disturb
programme.desc: A prostitute tries to outrun the police during a foot chase. A man claims he can only meet women at motels since he lives with his mom.

programme.title: Cops: Tree Hugging
programme.desc: An ex-felon threatens to kill his spouse after she announces she want to divorce him. A driver has suspicious plants in her car. A woman crashes her friends truck into a pedestrian and a tree.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)
programme.desc: On June 18, 2011, Marie-Jeanne Meyer, 17-years old, waved goodbye to her sister before leaving for her daily jog on the heights of Tournon in Ardèche. Three days later, her mutilated body was found in a freshly dug pit, near an area known to be cursed.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Adeline Piet Case
programme.desc: A man walks into a gendarmerie near Saint-Malo to report that his wife has been missing since the previous day. The couple are going through a divorce, but this mother would never have left her seven children alone! What has happened to Adeline Piet?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)
programme.desc: On March 31, 2003, firefighters were called to a fire in a housing estate of Meyrargues, near Aix-en-Provence. On site, they discovered a horrific scene: the tortured and charred bodies of a mother and her daughter, Chantal and Audrey D'Amato.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Dire Deception (Laurence Maille Case)
programme.desc: On November 28, 2007, Laurence Maille disappeared. It was her partner, John Zablevski, who alerted the Vimy police in Pas-de-Calais. He explained that the young woman had left in the morning for a walk with their dog and never returned.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Stabed In Her Bed: The Maureen Jaquier Case
programme.desc: On February 27, 2015, in Toulouse, the parents of 19-year-old Maureen Jacquier discover their daughter stabbed several times in her bed.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 405
programme.desc: To reindriftsutøvere fra Vest Finnmark havner i politiets søkelys etter å ha innrapportert flere hundre rovdyrskadde reinsdyr. Kan det virkelig være slik at de to har mishandlet dyrene sine for å motta erstatning?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: I juli 2022 rystes Mölndal da en død mann blir funnet halvt avkledd, brennemerket og med en båndopptaker plassert på kroppen. Politiet mistenker at noe langt mer urovekkende enn et vanlig drap har funnet sted.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 201
programme.desc: En augustdag i 1996 blir den 20 år gamle hotellarbeideren Trude Espås observert sittende på en stein ikke langt unna Geiranger sentrum. 11 dager senere blir hun funnet drept.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 203
programme.desc: Den tidligere artisten, flammeslukeren og TV-danseren Julio Kopseng lever et omsvermet liv i Oslos dansemiljø. Da han blir anmeldt for en voldtekt i 2013 utløses et skred av voldtektsanmeldelser mot ham.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 104
programme.desc: 10. august 2019 opplevde Norge nok et rystende terrorangrep. 21 år gamle Philip Manshaus dreper først sin 17 år gamle stesøster. Bevæpnet, og med uniform går han deretter til angrep mot Al-Noor moskeen i Bærum.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 101
programme.desc: Anne Elisabeth Hagen forsvinner sporløst fra sitt hjem høsten 2018. På en rød stol finner ektemann og milliardær, Tom Hagen et trusselbrev og krav om løsepenger.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Am the Night - Color Me Black

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Sounds and Silences

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Caesar and Me
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.desc: Major Ivan Kuchenko is trapped inside a hotel room with Commissar Vassiloff, a hitman, and Boris, his assistant, in the room across the street. Vassiloff has planted a bomb in the room and Ivan must find it within three hours or be blown to bits.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Examine Edwards Air Force Base's colorful history as America's premier flight test center for over 60 years; every Air Force aircraft was tested there, including current projects like the Airborne Laser designed to destroy ballistic missiles.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Emergency room medicine has only been a recognized specialty since 1989; episode examines advances that led to the modern emergency room - from the Byzantine's establishment of the first hospitals around 1050 A.D. to today's telemedicine.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Secret War: The Scholar and the Fight for Greece
programme.desc: Monty Woodhouse, a professor and a legend for blowing up the Gorgopotamos Bridge in Greece in 1942. In the British counter attack against Rommell at Al Alamein in North Africa it was vital to disrupt German supply routes, Greece.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Seizing Power
programme.desc: In 1930s Germany, Hitler capitalizes on economic woes blaming the Weimar Government and Jews. Despite scandals, Nazi rallies gain popularity and emerge as the largest party. Hitler becomes Chancellor in 1933, using the 'Enabling Act' to seize power.

programme.title: Secret War: The Banker, the Norwegians & the Bomb
programme.desc: Sir Charles attended Eton, and then joined the Coldstream Guards. He won the Military Cross on the Western Front and, having survived the war, returned to banking.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Frenzied Killing
programme.desc: Flere mennesker blir drept i 1944 enn noen gang før på Auschwitz. Nazistene prøver å så forvirring blant de allierte i øst, og de vestlige allierte tar beslutninger om å forhandle med nazistene om jødene og bombe leiren.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: The activities of nations after World War I that lead to World War II.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarlys største fan
programme.desc: iCarlys største fan, Mandy, blir invitert til showet som enslig studiopuplikum. Mandy viser seg å være mer av en forfølger enn et fan, og de blir nødt til å kvitte seg med henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Kyllinger på rømmen
programme.desc: Carly og Sam starter med å klekke ut kyllinger for et naturfagprosjekt. Kyllingene klekkes tidligere enn ventet og rømmer fra inkubatoren. Nå må Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer finne alle kyllingene rundt om i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ikke krangle
programme.desc: Carly makes Sam en unik iCarly T-skjorte for å markere årsdagen for vennskapet deres. Men når Sam bytter den bort mot konsertbiletter, havner de to vennene i klammeri.

programme.title: iCarly: Dansende drømmer
programme.desc: iCarly ber fansen om å sende inn videoer av dem selv når de danser sine kuleste danser. Over tre tusen danseklipp kommer inn, og Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å holde seg oppe hele natten for å se på alle videoene.

programme.title: iCarly: Det spøker på Halloween
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie sender iCarly fra en leilighet som det sies at det spøker i. Når det begynner å skje nifse ting, begynner også vennene å bli redde for at spøkelsesryktene er sanne.

programme.title: iCarly: En dag jeg vil angre
programme.desc: Spencer redder livet til hovedsangeren i The Plain White T's og får ham til å gå med på å delta i iCarly. Merkelige ting begynner å gå feil midt i Carlys, Sams og Freddies nettvideosending.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjensittingen
programme.desc: Sam må sitte igjen den kvelden iCarly holder sin 50. nettvideospesialsending. Carly og Freddie kan da altså ikke gjøre som de pleier, så de prøver så godt de kan å få gjennsitting de også, så de kan sende fra skolebenken med Sam.

programme.title: iCarly: Fotsår reklame
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie blir invitert til Dakas hovedkvarter, der de blir tilbudt en stor pengesum får å gå god for Dakas nye sko, Tech-foten, på iCarly. Men det viser seg at skoene er forferdelige.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg lover å ikke sladre
programme.desc: Carly får en B på historieprøven hun burde ha fått en A på. Sam, som griper sjansen på sitt ukentlige møte med rektor Franklin, forandrer Carlys karakter på datamaskinen og overrasker henne med A blank.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly redder TV
programme.desc: En prestisjetung produsent vil gjøre iCarly om til et TV-show. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie blir raskt fortvilet når de hører om alle de store forandringene produsenten ønsker å foreta.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg hater Sams kjæreste
programme.desc: Sam får en kjæreste og de to blir uadskillelige. Men når forholdet begynner å få følger for iCarly, forstår Carly og Freddie at de må gjøre noe.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: You Can’t Twin
programme.desc: On a visit to the Other Realm, Sabrina meets up with her evil twin Katrina who steals her passport and returns to mortal life posing as Sabrina.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: House of PI’s
programme.desc: Sabrina and Roxie are unexpectedly paired together to write a story in an effort to land a coveted spot on the school newspaper.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Halloween Scene
programme.desc: When Sabrina can’t find anyone to share her enthusiasm for Halloween she decides to throw her own haunted holiday bash and it turns into the party of the year.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Welcome Traveler
programme.desc: When Sabrina tries to pull Miles away from his latest conspiracy theory and into some semblance of a social life, she unknowingly pushes him right into the hands of a cult whose eccentric leader claims to be a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Some of My Best Friends are Half-Mortals
programme.desc: Tired of hiding her true identity when dating mortal guys, Sabrina agrees to be fixed up by Zelda with a handsome and charming witch, Derek. The budding romance is dashed when she encounters racism over the fact that she is half-mortal.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Lost @ C
programme.desc: Sabrina is distraught when she receives her first “C” ever on a class assignment and turns to Zelda for counseling. Zelda ends up conducting her own private tutoring session with Sabrina’s handsome professor.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: Sabrina opts to spend a picture-perfect Christmas with Morgan and her family rather than endure the annual insanity with Hilda and Zelda. She soon discovers the ugly secrets under the flawless façade.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: My Best Shot
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to give Josh a little confidence booster in his new passion to be a photographer, but her simple spell to help him make his first sale leads to his getting a big head and walking out on his job at the coffeehouse.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Tick-Tock Hilda’s Clock
programme.desc: When Sabrina throws Hilda a surprise party for her 650th birthday, Hilda becomes depressed that she doesn’t have a husband or family yet. Things go from bad to worse when Sabrina loses the out-of-whack biological clock.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s New Roommate
programme.desc: When Sabrina reluctantly takes in Zelda for a few days while Hilda’s on a home remodeling binge, Sabrina and her roommates try to loosen up her uptight Aunt Zelda.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Art Lover
programme.desc: Mallory feels threatened by an older woman who takes interest in Nick’s work.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Alex lands an assistant teaching position and has to grade Ellen’s papers.

programme.title: Fem i familien: My Buddy
programme.desc: Steven has a hard time accepting that Jennifer is growing up.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Once in Love With Elyse
programme.desc: Elyse’s coworker tells her that he’s in love with her.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Paper Chase
programme.desc: Mallory’s poor grades jeopardize her high school graduation.

programme.title: Fem i familien: My Back Pages
programme.desc: Steven revives the left-wing political magazine he established in college.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Be True to Your Preschool
programme.desc: Alex objects to the teaching style at Andrew’s elite pre-school.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Mrs. Wrong: Part 1
programme.desc: Nick and Mallory plan to elope when the Keaton’s oppose to marriage.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Mrs. Wrong: Part 2
programme.desc: The Keatons try to stop Mallory and Nick from eloping.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meegan & Andre Break Up
programme.desc: To venner kommer i klammeri på en klubb, Meegan og André har en seriøs samtale, en rapper går fra et intervju, Conrad flyr business class og Keegan har en ny bart.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Country Music
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Steve Jobs' efterfølger, Ice-T, som en uoppdragen valp og Rihanna og Chris Brown prøver igjen.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Branding
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan utforsker opplevelsen som sort collegestudent og snylterne som suksess medfører. Andre sketsjer inkluderer et nabolags reaksjon på et mystisk vesen, når man kan - og ikke kan - si et kontroversielt ord.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Alien Imposters
programme.desc: Romvesener invaderer jorden, en familie forliker seg med en slektnings homobryllup og noen rasister gir uttrykk for noen overraskende meninger.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Boarding Group One
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Keegan ikke får lov å gå om bord i flyet sitt, en bølle som nekter å helle ut innholdet i spritflaska og en bokser som sviner til modstanderen sin.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sexy Vampires
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en uhyggelig asiatisk spøkelsessamboer, kara ser på den lyse siden av tortur og Keegan opplever et hus fullt av sexy vampyrer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Airplane Showdown
programme.desc: En flyvert må håndtere en passasjer som ikke vil ha på sikkerhetsbeltet, britiske oppdagelsesreisende diskuterer sine reiser, to par forsøker å unngå spoilere på en dobbeltdate og en bibelgruppe opplever en guddommelig intervensjon.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MC Mom
programme.desc: En gangster deltar i et skuddrama, en mor skriver en sang til sønnen sin, to bondefangere konkurrerer, Big Boi møter André 3000 og to karer kommer ut for en bilulykke.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Scariest Movie Ever
programme.desc: En vampyr avslører seg selv, en seriemorder blir forhindret og et barn får ønsket sitt oppfylt.

programme.title: Key & Peele: A Cappella Club
programme.desc: En PSA jobber med barnesoldater i Afrika, en college-a-cappella-gruppe får et nytt medlem, Meegan og André går på sin første date, en terrorgruppe har en matbil og to gamle menn diskuterer popmusikk.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Cunnilingus Class
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Mr. T lærer oss livsleksjoner, Wendell har bruk for en ny seng og en fornærmelse som går over streken.

programme.title: Broad City: In Heat
programme.desc: Ilana leter febrilsk etter en gave i siste øyeblikk til Lincoln, mens Abbi prøver å finne et klimaanlegg for å få det kjølig på soveværelset.

programme.title: Broad City: Mochalatta Chills
programme.desc: Der dukker opp nye muligheter når Abbi endelig kan trene noen på Soulstice og Ilana gjør suksess som firmasjef.

programme.title: Broad City: Wisdom Teeth
programme.desc: Abbi skal trekke visdomstennene og Ilana ser det som sin plikt å passe henne til hun får det bedre - noe som selvfølgelig innebærer en masse 'medikamenter' og en total mangel på tilsyn.

programme.title: Broad City: Knockoffs
programme.desc: Abbi og Jeremy går på en date som ender med en overraskelse. Ilana og hennes mor leter etter den perfekte håndvesken.

programme.title: Broad City: Hashtag FOMO
programme.desc: Jentene leter etter den perfekte fest, noe som avslører en underlig og surrealistisk side av Abbi, som igjen bekrefter Ilanas verste anelser.

programme.title: Broad City: Citizen Ship
programme.desc: Gjengen skal feire at Jaime har blitt amerikansk statsborger, men Bevers fører Abbi og Ilana på avveier med å love dem gratis sprit. Imens må Lincoln og Jaime klare seg selv blandt alle advokatene.

programme.title: Broad City: Coat Check
programme.desc: Abbi prøver å finne en forsvunnet frakk, mens Ilana utforsker en ny romanse - som føles merkelig kjent.

programme.title: Broad City: St. Mark's
programme.desc: Når jentene feirer Ilanas 23. fødselsdag, blir de avbrudt av en rømt tenåring som fører dem ut på en vill jakt rundt i St. Mark's Place.

programme.title: Broad City: Two Chainz
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana opplever store klesuhell på vei til en venns utstilling og legger ut på en desperat jakt etter et offentlig toalett.

programme.title: Broad City: Co-Op
programme.desc: Abbi må late som om hun er Ilana for å ta hennes skift på jobben, mens Ilana drar til Long Island pga en svært viktig legetime.

programme.title: Broad City: Game Over
programme.desc: Ilana får en ny mulighet på Deals, Deals, Deals, og Abbi prøver å holde konkurranseinstinktet i sjakk på Soulstice Games Day.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Christian Karaoke Singles' Mixer

programme.title: RENO 911!: Proposition C
programme.desc: As Williams and Wiegel consider tampering with the vote for deputies' raises, Jones and Garcia tangle with a drug dealer who may be a D.E.A. agent.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Reno Mounties
programme.desc: Jones and Garcia discover that not just anyone can dispense justice from horseback.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Hodgepodge
programme.desc: The Reno Sheriff's Department takes more than seven hours to respond to a liquor store robbery.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Happy Anniversary
programme.desc: Dangle visits his ex-wife and her new husband on their anniversary, and the lady deputies stake out a lecherous meth dealer and his girlfriends.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Real Movies & Wu-Tang Financial
programme.desc: Dave takes a realistic look at "Pretty Woman" and "The Matrix" and introduces the Wu-Tang Clan's new financial consulting firm.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums's Intervention & Racist Hollywood Animals
programme.desc: Tyrone mistakes an intervention for a crack sale, and "Frontline" covers racist animals.

programme.desc: Dave sees people's inner thoughts and freaks out when a little kid beats him at video games.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: O'Dweeds & Trading Spouses

programme.desc: Dave debuts Samuel Jackson beer and reveals major upsets in "The Racial Draft."

programme.desc: Rick James is one of the baddest mothaf**kers of all time.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: True Hollywood Stories: Prince & Red Balls Energy Drink
programme.desc: Negrodamus answers questions, and Charlie Murphy plays basketball with Prince.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 'Men's Rights Lawyer'
programme.desc: Daniel hyrer juristen som er feministenes verste mareritt, blir kjent med landets mest gassfylte jente, og spriter opp tegngivingen for støtende ordbruk.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Mini Bike Jump
programme.desc: Daniel gir oppreisning til ei bikerdame som hoppet for nær solen (og ble brent), leker den eneste lek som gjør oss kvitt bigotteri og hat og viser det mest sexy siden noen viste brødene.

programme.title: Tosh.0: '7'
programme.desc: Daniel finner ut om en hard kropp har en myk side, beviser at andre kulturers bryllupstradisjoner er like fæle som amerikanske tradisjoner og avslører hvorfor han er den perfekte sengepartneren i nødssituasjoner.

programme.title: Tosh.0: '8'
programme.desc: Daniel tar et langt skritt tilbake til da han brukte rød og svart tømmerhoggerjakke (med matchende lue) og introduserer en ny spesialstyrkeingeniør-kandidat til det republikanske partiet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 'Catcaller'
programme.desc: Daniel tar igjen mot gatesjikane og frigjør toalettene fra sexistiske kjønnsnormers tyrrani.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 810
programme.desc: I sesongens siste episode før Daniel tar vårferie, får han undervisning i livet av en tysk party-prins, går inn på tv-spillmarkedet og tar farvel med tømmerhuggermoten.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 811
programme.desc: Daniel gir en veldig vokal Hillary Clinton-supporter gjenoppreisning, terroriserer Broadway og gir fansen en sjanse til å skrive en hilsen i årboka si.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 812
programme.desc: Daniel får litt hjelp av Dr. Pimple Popper og fortsetter å knuse oppdiktede verdensrekorder.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Queenzflip
programme.desc: Daniel sitter på i bilen til Queenzflip, frolfer på frontoret og møter vapings svar på Vincent van Gogh.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tiamat the Dragon
programme.desc: Daniel leker i høsttåken med en magisk drage, avslører den sanne identiteten til Pasadena Piper og tar farvel med sportens dårligste prognosemaker.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline discovers that Richard's father is a former vaudeville comic, Ben Karinsky and tries to reunite him with a reluctant Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline observes that her pet cat Salty is troubled, she consults her veterinarian boyfriend, Joe, who suggests taking Salty to an eccentric cat therapist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie's mother shows up on Annie's doorstep with suitcase in hand, Caroline finds herself caught in the middle.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Another side of Caroline's artistic expression -- her dream of being a ballerina -- is revealed when she is locked in a laundromat overnight with a homeless man.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Joe's romance takes a nosedive when his ex-girlfriend Lisa returns from her Greenpeace mission and seeks shelter at Joe's apartment.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie's sister Donna visits New York in hopes of resurrecting her career, she finds the love letter Richard hid from Caroline and decides that setting the lyrics to music could be her next big hit, forcing Richard to feel slightly off-key.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Del brings one of Richard's paintings to a posh country club to impress a girl, but the best impresssion is made on a wealthy socialite, much to Richard's delight.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline cheers Richard on when he gets the chance to win big money by making the half-court free-throw shot at a New York Knicks game.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard finds himself in a life-or-death predicament when Caroline aims to boost the value of his work by convincing an influential art columnist that Richard is a deceased artist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feels that Annie consistently chooses the men in her life over their friendship and challenges Annie to take a girls-only trip, but chaos ensues when they take a trip together and both girls find romance at a local ski resort.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas’ youthful and attractive mother makes her first visit to America, and after she and Alex meet and have an evening love affair, Latka assumes that he will soon be getting a new daddy.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Alex’s ear is nearly shot off in a holdup attempt in his cab, he stuns his fellow cabbies by quitting and exchanging his driving clothes for a waiter’s tuxedo at a snobbish French restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies fall victim to a Hollywood-style roller coaster ride when a production company visits to do a film on taxi drivers. Life at the Sunshine Cab Company turns into a continual champagne and buffet festivity.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When John crashes Cab 804, the cabbies are shocked into a period of mourning, as they reminisce about the wild and memorable events that occurred when they were driving the legendary cab.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas frantically works to save the cracked-up Cab 804 as the cabbies fondly recall times in the legendary auto when Alex delivered a baby, Louie beat a rich brat out of a wad of money, and Elaine met the perfect man.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a dream come true for Tony when he’s challenged by an aging ex-champ, but he has more than just a fight on his hand when the opposition unveils its secret weapon.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies are in for a comedy surprise when the small town kid Bobby befriends, Steve, lands a big role as Romeo the first day he arrives in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Taxi
